records.question: chicken parmesan
records.ground_truth: A recipe for chicken parmesan — breaded chicken breast topped with marinara sauce and melted mozzarella cheese, typically baked or pan-fried.
contexts:
Title: Chicken Parmesan(Aunt Sue'S Recipe)
Ingredients: 2 eggs, beaten, Italian bread crumbs, garlic, Parmesan cheese, 6 boneless, skinless chicken breasts, Mozzarella cheese, oregano, Ragu spaghetti sauce (with green peppers, mushrooms and onions)
Directions: Dip chicken in eggs. Roll in bread crumbs. Brown in olive oil and garlic (both sides). Grease casserole. On bottom, layer spaghetti sauce, chicken, Mozzarella cheese, garlic, oregano and Parmesan. Layer more spaghetti sauce and top with more Parmesan.

Title: Chicken Parmesan
Ingredients: 4 boneless chicken breasts, Italian dressing, Progresso bread crumbs, 1 jar spaghetti sauce, 1 whole small peeled onion, 1 peeled clove garlic, spaghetti noodles, Mozzarella cheese
Directions: Dip chicken in Italian dressing, then bread crumbs. Bake at 350° for 30 minutes. Add a layer of Mozzarella cheese the last few minutes (3 to 5) of cooking. Cook jar of spaghetti sauce over low heat. Add onion and garlic clove. Remove when finished cooking. Cook spaghetti noodles. Prepare plate.

Title: Simple Chicken Parmesan
Ingredients: 4 chicken breasts, 4 provolone cheese slices, 1 small jar spaghetti sauce, 4 oz. shredded parmesan
Directions: Place breasts in a well greased baking dish. Top each breast with a provolone cheese slice. Pour spaghetti sauce over provolone cheese slices. Bake at 400 degrees for 30 minutes. Sprinkle with parmesan and serve.

Title: Chicken Crumb Parmesan
Ingredients: 3 lb. boneless chicken pieces, 4 1/2 c. fresh bread crumbs, 1 1/4 c. grated Parmesan cheese, 1 Tbsp. salt, 1/3 c. parsley, 1 1/2 c. butter, 1 clove garlic, 1 Tbsp. Dijon mustard, 1 1/2 tsp. Worcestershire sauce
Directions: In blender, combine bread, Parmesan cheese, salt and parsley.

Title: Quick Chicken Parmesan
Ingredients: 6 chicken thighs (or equivalent in other parts), 2 c. spaghetti sauce, 1/2 lb. Mozzarella cheese, sliced, Parmesan cheese
Directions: Place chicken in a baking dish, about 8 x 8-inch). Place sliced Mozzarella cheese over chicken. Pour sauce over all. Top with Parmesan cheese. Bake at 350° until chicken is cooked, about 45 minutes. Serve with garlic bread and/or spaghetti noodles.

records.question: beef stroganoff
records.ground_truth: A recipe for beef stroganoff — tender strips of beef cooked in a creamy mushroom and sour cream sauce, typically served over egg noodles.
records.answer: Beef Stroganoff (Governor Jim Guy Tucker'S Favorite Recipe)(Grandma'S Recipe)
contexts:
Title: Beef Stroganoff (Governor Jim Guy Tucker'S Favorite Recipe)(Grandma'S Recipe)
Ingredients: 2 lb. filet of beef, 4 Tbsp. butter, 1 c. chopped onion, 1 clove garlic, finely chopped, 3 Tbsp. flour, 2 tsp. meat extract paste, 1 Tbsp. catsup, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/8 tsp. pepper, 1 can beef bouillon, undiluted, 1/4 c. dry white wine, 1 Tbsp. fresh snipped dill, 1 1/2 c. sour cream, 1 1/2 c. cooked wild rice, 1 1/2 c. cooked white rice or 3 c. cooked noodles
Directions: Trim fat from beef and cut filet crosswise into 1/2-inch thick slices. Cut each slice across grain into 1/2-inch wide strips (about 2 inches long). Slowly heat large, heavy skillet. Melt 1 tablespoon butter; add beef strips, just enough to cover skillet bottom. Over high heat, sear quickly on all sides. Remove with tongs as meat finishes browning (it should be brown on outside and rare on inside).

Title: Beef Stroganoff - Mom'S
Ingredients: 1 1/2 lb. beef round steak, cut into strips, 1/4 c. flour, 1/4 c. butter, dash of pepper, 1 (4 oz.) sliced mushrooms, drained, 1/2 c. chopped onions, 1 small clove garlic, minced, 1 can Campbell's beef broth, 1 c. sour cream
Directions: Cut sliced round steak into thin strips; dust with flour and dash of pepper. In a large skillet, brown the meat in butter; add mushrooms, onions and garlic and brown lightly. Stir in beef broth and cover; cook until meat is tender, stirring now and then. Gradually stir in sour cream, cook over low heat for 5 minutes. Serve over cooked noodles.

Title: Classic Beef Stroganoff
Ingredients: 1 Tbsp. flour, 1 lb. beef sirloin, cut into 1/4-inch strips, 1/2 c. chopped onion, 2 Tbsp. butter, 1 Tbsp. flour, 1 1/4 c. beef stock or 1 can condensed beef broth, 1/2 tsp. butter, 1 c. thinly sliced mushrooms, 1 clove garlic, minced, 3 Tbsp. flour, 1 Tbsp. tomato paste, 1 c. sour cream, 2 Tbsp. cooking sherry
Directions: Combine 1 tablespoon flour with salt. Dredge meat in mixture. Heat skillet and add 2 tablespoons butter. When heated, add sirloin strips and brown quickly, flipping meat to turn all sides. Add mushrooms, onions and garlic. Cook 3 or 4 minutes until onion is barely tender. Remove meat and mushrooms. Add 2 tablespoons butter to pan drippings. When melted, blend 3 tablespoons flour. Add tomato paste slowly. Pour cold meat. Cook and stir until thickened. Return meat and mushrooms to skillet and stir in sour cream and sherry. Heat briefly. Keep warm over hot water. Serve over hot buttered noodles.

Title: Sensational Beef Stroganoff
Ingredients: 1 lb. boneless round steak (3/4-inch), 2 Tbsp. margarine, divided, 1/2 c. chopped onion, 1 (10 oz.) can cream of mushroom soup, 1/2 tsp. paprika, 1/2 c. sour cream or yogurt, hot, cooked noodles
Directions: Slice beef across the grain into very thin strips. In skillet over high heat in 1 tablespoon margarine, cook 1/2 of beef and 1/2 of onion until beef is no longer pink and onion is tender. Set aside and repeat with remaining margarine, beef and onion. Return meat mixture to skillet. Stir in soup and paprika. Heat through, stirring occasionally. Reduce heat to very low. Stir in sour cream. Gently heat through. Serve on hot noodles.

Title: Ketchup Beef Stroganov
Ingredients: 1 lb beef sirloin, cut into thin strips, 2 big onions, thinly sliced, 1 tsp salt, 1/2 tsp black pepper, 4 Tbsp vegetable oil, 1 c. ketchup
Directions: In a medium glass bowl mix all ingredients together and stir well. Refrigerate over night. In a medium skillet, over medium heat cook the marinated meat with juices for about 45 minutes, or until meat is tender, stirring occasionally. When almost done, stir in 1 cup of ketchup and let boil about 1 minute, stirring constantly. Serve over fries.

records.question: chicken tikka masala
records.ground_truth: A recipe for chicken tikka masala — marinated chicken pieces cooked in a spiced tomato and cream sauce, served with rice or naan.
contexts:
Title: Chicken Tikka Masala Recipe
Ingredients: 1 teaspoon Cumin powder (Jeera), 1 teaspoon Coriander Powder (Dhania), 1/2 cup Curd (Dahi / Yogurt), 1 tablespoon Butter (unsalted), Sunflower Oil - as required, 1 Cloves (Laung), 1/4 teaspoon Cinnamon Powder (Dalchini), Salt - to taste, 1/2 cup Fresh cream, 5 Cashew nuts, 1 inch Ginger - finely chopped, Salt - as required, 1 tablespoon Kasuri Methi (Dried Fenugreek Leaves), 300 grams Chicken - cut into small size pieces, 6 cloves Garlic - finely chopped, 1/2 teaspoon Red Chilli powder, 1/2 teaspoon Turmeric powder (Haldi), 1 Tomato, 1-1/2 teaspoon Coriander Powder (Dhania), 1/4 teaspoon Cardamom Powder (Elaichi), 1 Onion
Directions: To begin making the Chicken Tikka Masala, thoroughly clean and wash the chicken pieces To marinate the Chicken for the Chicken Tikka Masala, in a mixing bowl, combine yogurt, cumin powder, coriander powder, turmeric powder, ginger, garlic, chili powder, kasuri methi and salt along with the chicken Allow the chicken to marinate for a minimum of 30 minutes Once the chicken is marinated, in a pan, add a teaspoon of oil and cook marinated chicken pieces until they are cooked well for about 8 minutes The chicken pieces should be juicy and tender.Cooking chicken for an extended time will make them hard and rubbery Do not add water.The next step is to make the tikka masala gravy Heat a teaspoon of oil over medium heat Add onion and cook until they become translucent Add tomatoes and cook them for about two minutes Add cashews and toss them for a minute Allow the onion tomato masala to cool down.Once it cools down, grind onion, tomato, and cashew into a fine paste.Heat a kadai/wok with a tablespoon of butter Once the butter melts, add cloves, cinnamon powder, and cardamom powder and saute until aroma comes out.Add cumin powder and coriander powder and combine them well.Add the onion-tomato-cashew puree to the pan, combine them well and saute for few minutes.Crush kasuri methi with your hand and add to the tikka masala gravy Add the marinated chicken pieces, required amount of salt and cream Toss the chicken tikka masala well so that they are combined well.Simmer the chicken tikka masala for about 5 minutes If the tikka masala is of thicker consistency, adjust addition of water according to your requirements.Switch off heat and garnish the chicken tikka masala with coriander leaves and it is ready to be served.Serve Chicken Tikka Masala with Dhaba Style Spicy Ghee Rice Recipe Made From Whole Spices or Butter Garlic Naan Recipe (Garlic Flavoured Flat Bread) and Pickled onions for a complete Weekend dinner

Title: Hariyali Chicken Tikka Masala Recipe
Ingredients: 1 cup Coriander (Dhania) Leaves, 1/2 teaspoon Turmeric powder (Haldi), 1 Green Chilli, 1 teaspoon Cumin powder (Jeera), 1 cup Mint Leaves (Pudina), Salt - to taste, 2 teaspoons Garam masala powder, 1 teaspoon Red Chilli powder, 1/4 cup Fresh cream, 1/4 cup Curd (Dahi / Yogurt), 1 teaspoon Amchur (Dry Mango Powder), 300 grams Chicken breasts - cut into small pieces
Directions: To begin making the Hariyali Chicken Tikka Masala Recipe, we will first grind the coriander leaves, mint leaves and green chilli to a smooth paste in a mixer grinder.Add this ground paste along with turmeric powder, garam masala powder, amchur powder, cumin powder and curd into a bowl Mix everything well.Add chicken pieces to this marination and salt to taste Mix well and keep it aside for about 1 hour.After an hour, heat a heavy bottomed pan with oil and add only the chicken pieces into the kadai to fry.Fry until the chicken pieces are cooked and they crisp up Take them out and keep it aside.In the same kadai, add the remaining marination gravy that is left out, and cook till the gravy has reduced This will take about 3 to 4 minutes.Check for salt and seasoning, if required you can add them Add cream at the end and little bit of water to adjust consistency.Cook for 2 minutes and add cooked chicken pieces into the gravy and serve hot.Serve the Hariyali Chicken Tikka Masala Recipe along with Tawa Paratha or Garlic Naan and Burani Raita with Saunf Aloo & Dal Kebab Recipe by the side to make it a complete meal

Title: Chicken Tikka Recipe
Ingredients: 1 tablespoon Lemon juice, 1 tablespoon Garam masala powder, 1 teaspoon Cumin powder (Jeera), 1 teaspoon Ginger Garlic Paste, 1 tablespoon Gram flour (besan), 1 teaspoon Coriander Powder (Dhania), 2 tablespoons Red Chilli powder, 1 teaspoon Ajwain (Carom seeds), 500 grams Boneless chicken, 4 tablespoons Curd (Dahi / Yogurt), Salt, 1 teaspoon Turmeric powder (Haldi)
Directions: To begin making the Chicken Tikka Recipe, add chicken with lemon juice, ginger garlic paste, turmeric powder and salt in a mixing bowl Mix everything well and keep it aside for about 1 hour.Heat a sauce pan with oil, add ajwain seeds and allow them to splutter for few seconds Reduce the flame and add the gram flour and cook for about 2 to 3 minutes till the gram flour is roasted well Switch off the heat.Into the marinated chicken, add curd, red chilli powder, garam masala powder, cumin powder, coriander powder, salt and the gram flour mixture Mix everything well Rest this marinated chicken mixture in the fridge for one more hour.After an hour, heat a grill pan, grease it with oil Once it is heated, take the chicken pieces out and put them into wooden skewers.Place the skewers gently on the greased pan and cook on all the sides until the chicken pieces are charred and cooked well Once done, take them off the heat and serve hot.Serve the Chicken Tikka Recipe along with Dahi Pudina Chutney and some Pickled Onions for your party starters

Title: Chicken Tikka
Ingredients: 1 (3 lb.) chicken, boned and cut into 8ths, 1 tsp. pulped ginger, 1 tsp. pulped garlic, 1 1/2 tsp. ground coriander, 1 1/2 tsp. ground cumin, 1 tsp. chili powder, 3 Tbsp. plain yoghurt, 1 tsp. salt, 2 Tbsp. lemon juice, 1 sliced onion, 1 Tbsp. tomato puree, red food coloring (optional), 3 Tbsp. oil, 1 lemon, cut in wedges, 6 lettuce leaves
Directions: In a large mixing bowl, blend spices together with yoghurt, salt, lemon juice, coloring and tomato puree. Add chicken pieces and coat well. Leave overnight or for at least 3 hours.

Title: Chicken Tikki Recipe
Ingredients: 2 tbsp oil - for frying, 1 tsp coriander powder, 1 onion - finely chopped, 2 tbsp rice flour, 1 tsp turmeric powder, 1/2 tsp cumin powder, 1 tbsp garam masala powder, 1 tsp ginger garlic paste, 1 egg - Whisk, 4 sprig green coriander - finely chopped, salt - as per taste, 1 cup bread crumbs, 400 grams chicken - tighten / mince, 1 tsp red chilli powder
Directions: To begin making Chicken Tikki Recipe, first pour the eggs in a bowl, beat and keep them aside Now take chicken in a bowl Add garam masala powder, red chilli powder, turmeric powder, coriander powder, cumin powder and mix well Now add ginger garlic paste, onion, coriander, rice flour, 1/4 cup bread crumbs, salt And mix well Now make a lemon size ball of this mixture Pour these balls into the egg mixture and then coat them with bread crumbs Now press it flat between the two hands to shape the cutlet Make sari tikki by doing this Now heat oil on a pan Add the tikkis and cook till crisp from both the sides It will take at least 7 to 8 minutes Once crisp, remove from pan and serve Serve the Chicken Tikki recipe with coriander mint chutney and masala tea for an evening snack

records.question: beef tacos
records.ground_truth: A recipe for beef tacos — seasoned ground beef served in corn or flour tortillas with toppings such as cheese, lettuce, salsa, and sour cream.
contexts:
Title: California Tacos
Ingredients: 1 large onion, chopped, 3 lb. ground beef, 2 cans Mexican chili beans, dash of Tabasco sauce, 1/2 to 1 green pepper, chopped, 2 cans taco sauce (small) or 2 medium cans tomatoes and chilies
Directions: Brown meat. Add onions, pepper, sauce, beans and Tabasco. Add water if it seems dry. Simmer, for taste.

Title: Tacos
Ingredients: 1 pkg. shaped taco shells or 1 pkg. soft tortillas, 1 lb. ground beef or turkey, grated Cheddar cheese, chopped olives, chopped tomatoes, shredded cheese, sour cream, hot sauce
Directions: Brown chopped meat, stirring often. Add salt and pepper to taste. Drain off fat. Put ground meat in a bowl. Everyone puts their favorite things on their own tacos. Eat and enjoy.

Title: Taco Bell Tacos
Ingredients: 1 1/2 lb. ground beef, 2 tsp. salt, 1 c. chili sauce, 1/8 tsp. pepper, 1 c. flour, 1 c. cornmeal, 1 Tbsp. shortening, 1 egg, 1/2 c. water, 1 1/2 c. shredded Cheddar cheese, 2 c. shredded lettuce, fat (for deep-fat frying)
Directions: Brown ground beef in skillet. Add 1 teaspoon salt, chili sauce and pepper. Simmer 5 to 10 minutes. Combine flour, cornmeal and 1 teaspoon salt in mixing bowl. Cut in shortening until particles are fine. Combine egg and water; sprinkle over flour mixture while stirring with fork until dough holds together. If dough is sticky, toss on well floured surface. Divide into 12 portions. Roll each portion on floured surface to a 6-inch circle. Fry in hot deep fat at 375° until golden brown, about 1 minute. Turn and brown other side. Remove from fat and immediately fill each with 1 to 2 tablespoons warm ground beef, cheese and lettuce. Fold in half. Makes 12 tacos.

Title: Taco Meal
Ingredients: 2 cans refried beans, 1 lb. ground beef, 2 c. shredded cheese, 1 jar salsa
Directions: Put beans in bottom of 9 x 13-inch pan. Brown beef with onion and garlic. Drain. Put over beans. Sprinkle cheese over meat and salsa on top. Bake at 350° until hot and cheese melts. Cut lettuce and tomatoes and top with sour cream. Eat with tortilla chips.

Title: Beef And Cheddar Soft Tacos
Ingredients: 1 can Cheddar cheese soup, 1/2 cup salsa, 8, 8 inch flour tortillas, 2 cups shredded lettuce, 1 pound ground beef
Directions: Cook beef in skillet until browned. Pour off fat. Add soup and salsa and heat through. Spoon about 1/3 cup meat mixture down center of each tortilla. Top with Lettuce. Fold tortilla around filling. Serve with additional salsa or rice.

records.question: spaghetti carbonara
records.ground_truth: A recipe for spaghetti carbonara — pasta coated in a creamy sauce made from eggs, Parmesan cheese, pancetta or bacon, and black pepper.
contexts:
Title: Spaghetti Parmesan
Ingredients: 2 lb. spaghetti, 5 oz. butter, 4 qt. water, 5 oz. Parmesan cheese, 2 c. tomato sauce
Directions: Cook spaghetti in boiling salted water. Do not overcook; it is preferable that spaghetti be firm. After draining, place spaghetti in a large shallow saucepan. Add tomato sauce and cheese. Stir mixture over heat until the cheese melts and forms strands. Arrange spaghetti in a serving platter. Sprinkle with cheese and dot with pieces of butter.

Title: Carbonara Spaghetti
Ingredients: 12 oz. spaghetti, 4 strips bacon, crisp and crumbled, 3 eggs, scrambled, 1/2 c. Parmesan cheese, 1 or 2 Tbsp. butter, milk, yogurt (or cream)
Directions: Have all ingredients at room temperature. Cook spaghetti; drain. Mix all ingredients with spaghetti immediately. Serve with more grated cheese, if desired.

Title: Spaghetti Ala Carbonara*
Ingredients: 1/2 lb. bacon, cooked crisp, drained and diced, 1 lb. spaghetti, cooked tender according to pkg. directions, 1/4 c. cream, light cream or milk, 1 egg, 1/4 c. Parmesan cheese, salt, freshly ground black pepper
Directions: Mix cream, egg, Parmesan cheese and bacon together. Toss with cooked spaghetti. Sprinkle with salt, Parmesan cheese and plenty of freshly ground black pepper. Serve immediately!

Title: Italian Spaghetti With Olive Oil
Ingredients: 1 lb. spaghetti, Romano cheese, 3 Tbsp. olive oil, 2 cloves garlic, minced, salt to taste, 1 c. bread crumbs
Directions: Cook spaghetti according to package directions. In frying pan, as spaghetti cooks, add garlic to oil. Brown. Drain spaghetti. Pour oil-garlic mixture on top of the spaghetti. Sprinkle with bread crumbs and as much cheese as desired.

Title: Homemade Italian Spaghetti(Special Seasoning)
Ingredients: 1 whole pack carrots, 1 whole onion, 1 whole garlic bulb, 1 whole bunch parsley, 1 whole stalk celery, 1 slab fatback (no lean meat), salt, pepper, allspice, basil, mushrooms, bell pepper, onions, 2 cans tomato paste, 2 cans tomato sauce, hamburger meat
Directions: Combine first 6 ingredients in food processor. Freeze fatback prior to grinding. After all ingredients are ground up, add a dash of allspice and basil leaves. Makes about 6 quarts.

records.question: caesar salad
records.ground_truth: A recipe for Caesar salad — romaine lettuce tossed with Caesar dressing made from anchovies, garlic, lemon, and Parmesan, topped with croutons.
contexts:
Title: Ceasar Salad
Ingredients: 3 cloves garlic, pressed, 1/3 tube anchovy paste, 1 tsp. mustard, 1 tsp. Worcestershire sauce, 2 Tbsp. lemon juice, 1 egg yolk, 1/2 c. oil, Romaine lettuce, Parmesan cheese, croutons
Directions: Wash and dry romaine; mix with a whisk the garlic, anchovy paste, mustard, Worcestershire sauce and lemon juice. Add egg yolk and oil and mix again. Pour dressing over lettuce. Add cheese and croutons and eat immediately.

Title: Quick And Easy Caesar Salad
Ingredients: 1 head Romaine or green leaf lettuce, 1 cucumber, sliced, 1 box Caesar croutons, 1 pkg. fresh grated Parmesan cheese, 1 bottle Kraft Caesar salad dressing, 1 purple or red onion, sliced (optional), 1 carton cherry tomatoes, salt and pepper to taste
Directions: In a large salad bowl place lettuce (torn into bite-size pieces), cucumber, 1/2 box of croutons, 1/2 of cheese, salt and pepper. Do not add dressing until you are ready to serve salad. Shake dressing well and pour approximately 1/2 to 3/4 of dressing on salad. Add salt and pepper to taste. Toss salad well. Garnish individual servings with tomatoes and onion. Sprinkle cheese on top, if desired.

Title: Caesar Salad
Ingredients: 2 Tbsp. grated Parmesan cheese, 2 Tbsp. water, 2 Tbsp. red wine vinegar, 1 tsp. Worcestershire sauce, 1 Tbsp. olive oil, 1 clove garlic, 1/4 tsp. dry mustard, 1 large bunch romaine lettuce, cleaned and torn into pieces, 1/3 c. croutons (optional)
Directions: Combine all ingredients together except lettuce in food processor and blend until smooth. Pour over lettuce, tossing well. Top with croutons, if desired. Yields 4 servings.

Title: Caesar Salad(Serves 4 People)
Ingredients: romaine lettuce, 2 Tbsp. anchovies, 1 tsp. garlic, 1 1/2 Tbsp. Dijon mustard, 1 egg, 1 tsp. Worcestershire sauce, 1 1/2 c. olive oil, fresh cracked pepper, 2 Tbsp. dried Parmesan cheese
Directions: Using a large bowl, take a large spoon and mash anchovies and garlic into a paste. Add Dijon mustard; mix good. Add egg yolk and Worcestershire sauce. Stir the olive oil in slowly until it thickens. Toss enough romaine lettuce to serve 4 people. Add fresh cracked pepper, then top with Parmesan cheese.

Title: Chicken Caesar Salad
Ingredients: 4 boneless chicken breasts, 1 head romaine or leaf lettuce, croutons (Italian), 1 bottle Caesar salad dressing, onion powder, garlic powder, salt, 2 hard-boiled eggs, diced, Parmesan cheese
Directions: Sprinkle onion powder, garlic powder and salt on cubed chicken breasts to your liking. Fry until chicken cubes are browned.

records.question: banana bread
records.ground_truth: A recipe for banana bread — a moist quick bread made with ripe mashed bananas, flour, eggs, butter, and sugar, baked in a loaf pan.
contexts:
Title: Banana Clay
Ingredients: ripe bananas
Directions: Peel bananas and freeze them in an airtight container. Remove from freezer when frozen solid and blend in blender with a little water or orange juice.

Title: Rolled Bananas
Ingredients: bananas (not too ripe), mayonnaise, crushed peanuts
Directions: Peel bananas; cut in half (not lengthwise). Spread with mayonnaise; roll in crushed peanuts.

Title: Berry Bananas
Ingredients: ripe bananas, fresh strawberries or blueberries or both, yogurt or milk (optional), brown sugar (optional)
Directions: Slice the bananas. Wash and clean the berries. Layer the banana slices and berries in a dish. If desired, add yogurt or milk and sprinkle with brown sugar.

Title: Banana Chips
Ingredients: bananas, sugar (regular)
Directions: Slice bananas very thin. Sprinkle with sugar. Bake in oven on cookie sheet at 350° until crisp.

Title: Sauteed Bananas
Ingredients: bananas, confectioners sugar, flour, butter
Directions: Peel bananas, cut in half lengthwise, and again cut in half crosswise. Sprinkle with flour. Saute in butter until delicately brown. Drain. Sprinkle with confectioners sugar.

records.question: chicken noodle soup
records.ground_truth: A recipe for chicken noodle soup — a broth-based soup with cooked chicken pieces, egg noodles, carrots, celery, and onion.
contexts:
Title: Jiffy Chicken Noodle Soup
Ingredients: 1 can chicken chunks (white meat), 1 can chicken broth, 1 can water, 1 c. sliced celery, 1 c. sliced mushrooms, 1 (8 oz.) pkg. egg noodles, salt and pepper to taste
Directions: Heat together the first 5 ingredients. Cook until flavors blend. Add the noodles, salt and pepper. Cook until noodles are done.

Title: Easy Chicken And Noodles
Ingredients: 1 lb. boiled chicken, boned, 1 (12 oz.) pkg. noodles (egg or dumplings), 1 can cream of mushroom soup, 1 can cream of chicken soup, garlic pepper, onion to taste, salt
Directions: Boil chicken in 4 quarts of water with seasoning in water. Remove chicken and debone. Cook noodles in chicken broth until done. Add chicken and soups to the noodles. Do not drain the noodles. Simmer for 20 minutes.

Title: Easy Chicken Noodle Soup
Ingredients: 3 c. water, 1 pkg. chicken flavor Ramen noodles (3 oz. pkg.), 2 c. cooked chicken, cut up, 2 medium stalks bok choy (with leaves), 1/2 c. carrot (about 1 medium carrot)
Directions: Heat water to boiling in 3-quart saucepan. Break block of noodles; reserve seasoning packet. Stir noodles, chicken, bok choy and carrot into water. Heat to boiling; reduce heat. Simmer, uncovered, 3 minutes, stirring occasionally. Stir in seasoning packet.

Title: Comforting Chicken Noodle Soup
Ingredients: 2 qt. water, 8 chicken bouillon cubes, 6 1/2 c. uncooked egg noodles, 2 cans cream of chicken soup, 3 c. cubed chicken, 1 c. sour cream, parsley
Directions: In large saucepan, bring water and bouillon to boil. Add noodles and cook until tender. DO NOT DRAIN. Add soup and chicken. Heat through. Remove from heat. Stir in sour cream and sprinkle with parsley.

Title: Homemade Chicken Noodle Soup
Ingredients: Chicken, cooked and deboned, save broth, 1 box garlic, chopped, 2 bunches green onions, chopped fine, 1 bunch parsley, chopped fine, but not the stems, 1 medium onion, chopped, 4 chicken bouillon cubes, 1 can chicken broth, 1 pkg. spaghetti noodles
Directions: After chicken is cooked, place the rest of the ingredients in the left over broth, except the noodles. Bring to a rolling boil. Simmer until onions are done, then add noodles. Cook until noodles are done. This makes a large pot of soup, for about 10.

records.question: what can I make with chicken and garlic
records.ground_truth: A recipe that uses chicken and garlic as primary ingredients, such as garlic butter chicken, roasted garlic chicken, or chicken with garlic sauce.
contexts:
Title: Chicken With 40 Cloves Of Garlic
Ingredients: 2 Tbsp. margarine, 1 Tbsp. olive oil, 1 chicken, cut up, 40 cloves garlic, unpeeled, 2 Tbsp. lemon juice, 1/2 tsp. dried thyme, 1 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1/4 c. water
Directions: Preheat oven to 350°. In large Dutch oven, melt margarine in oil. Add cut-up chicken, turning until golden (5 to 10 minutes). Tilt pan and spoon off all but 2 tablespoons fat. Add garlic and stir. Sprinkle with lemon, thyme, salt, pepper and water. Cover tightly and bake 1 1/2 hours. Makes 4 servings.

Title: 40 Cloves Garlic Chicken
Ingredients: chicken pieces (legs, thighs, split breasts and wings), 40 cloves garlic (about 3 heads), 1/2 to 1 c. white wine, 1/4 c. lemon juice, paprika
Directions: Put chicken parts in roasting pan. Break heads of garlic apart; do not peel. Put in pan with chicken. Pour wine and lemon juice over chicken. Sprinkle with paprika. Cover pan with foil. Bake at 350° to 375° for 1 hour. Remove foil and brown under broiler. Serve with French bread to spread roasted garlic on top.

Title: Garlic Chicken
Ingredients: 1 cut up fryer or 12 chicken legs or wings, broth, 3 Tbsp. soy sauce, 3 Tbsp. or more sugar to taste, 7 cloves garlic, crushed
Directions: Precook chicken in very little water. Combine broth with soy sauce, sugar and garlic. Simmer and mix. Add chicken and baste often until sauce thickens to heavy syrup consistency.

Title: Forty Cloves Of Garlic Chicken
Ingredients: 2 Tbsp. butter, 1 Tbsp. olive oil, 1 (3 lb.) chicken, cut up, 40 garlic cloves (unpeeled), 2 Tbsp. lemon juice, 1/2 tsp. dried thyme, 1 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. freshly ground pepper
Directions: Preheat oven to 350°. In a large Dutch oven, melt butter in olive oil. Add chicken and cook, turning until golden, 5 to 10 minutes. Tilt pan and spoon off all but 2 tablespoons fat. Add garlic and stir to coat. Sprinkle with lemon juice, thyme, salt, pepper and 1/4 cup water. Cover tightly and bake for 1 1/2 hours.

Title: Grilled Garlic Chicken
Ingredients: 1 envelope new Lipton Recipe Secrets garlic mushroom soup mix, 3 Tbsp. olive or vegetable oil, 4 chicken breast, boneless and skinless, halved about 1 1/4 lb.
Directions: In medium bowl, combine garlic mushroom mix with oil. Add chicken and toss to coat. Grill or broil until chicken is no longer pink. Makes 4 servings. Results guaranteed.

records.question: recipes using ground beef and tomatoes
records.ground_truth: A recipe that uses ground beef and tomatoes as main ingredients, such as bolognese, chili, stuffed peppers, or a beef and tomato stir fry.
contexts:
Title: Red Beans
Ingredients: 1 pkg. dry pinto beans, 1 can Ro-Tel tomatoes, diced, 1 lb. extra lean ground beef
Directions: Add all ingredients together with enough water to cook until tender and of desired consistency.

Title: Cherry Tomato Treats
Ingredients: 3/4 lb. cherry tomatoes, 3/4 lb. ground beef, 1 Tbsp. minced onion, 3 Tbsp. dried bread crumbs, 2 Tbsp. soy sauce, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. pepper, 1/2 tsp. thyme, snipped parsley, 1/2 tsp. basil, grated Parmesan cheese
Directions: Cut a thin slice from the top and bottom of each tomato. Scoop out the insides and reserve for adding to meat mixture. Brown meat and add onion; drain. Add seasonings and simmer for 5 minutes. Remove from heat and cool slightly. Add bread crumbs and tomato pulp and mix. Stuff each tomato with the meat mixture. Sprinkle the top of each tomato with grated Parmesan cheese and snipped parsley.

Title: Tomatoes Yemistess(Greece)
Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 2 Tbsp. butter or margarine, 1 small onion, 1/2 c. ground parsley, 1/4 c. blanched slivered almonds, 1 tsp. cinnamon, 1 1/2 tsp. salt, 2 Tbsp. sugar, 1/2 c. uncooked converted rice, 6 to 8 fresh unpeeled medium tomatoes, 4 quartered raw potatoes
Directions: Cook meat, butter and onion until browned in saucepan or electric skillet. Add parsley, almonds, cinnamon, salt and sugar. Simmer 5 minutes. Add rice. Cook over low heat 5 minutes. Hollow out tomatoes, reserving pulp and juice. Fill with rice mixture.

Title: Texas Red
Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 1 can tomatoes, 1 large onion, chunked, 1 tsp. garlic powder, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/8 tsp. cayenne pepper
Directions: Brown beef in skillet. Add remaining ingredients. Great over spaghetti or macaroni.

Title: Hamburger Stew
Ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, 1 can tomato paste, 6 to 8 potatoes, cut up, 1 small onion, cut up, 1 large can diced tomato
Directions: Boil potatoes. Drain 1/2 water off (only boil until potatoes are tender). Brown ground beef with onions and drain. Add ground beef, 2 cups of fresh water, tomatoes and tomato paste. Heat until boiling. Turn down to simmer for 30 minutes.

records.question: what can I cook with eggs and cheese
records.ground_truth: A recipe that uses eggs and cheese as primary ingredients, such as a frittata, quiche, omelette, or cheesy scrambled eggs.
contexts:
Title: Cheese Eggs
Ingredients: 6 eggs, 3 slices cheese, 1/4 stick margarine, 1/3 c. milk, salt and pepper to taste
Directions: Melt margarine in skillet over medium heat. Beat eggs. Add cheese torn in pieces. Add milk, salt and pepper. Mix well. Pour into skillet and cook until soft done.

Title: Cheesy Omelets
Ingredients: 4 eggs, 2/3 c. 2% milk, 1 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. pepper, 3 presliced pieces cheese, 1/4 c. diced onions, 1/4 c. diced sweet peppers
Directions: Preheat skillet. Mix eggs, milk, salt and pepper. Pour mixture into skillet. When eggs are done, turn burner to simmer. Break cheese into 4ths and place on eggs. Serve after cheese melts.

Title: Eggs And Cheese
Ingredients: 4 eggs, 1/2 c. shredded Cheddar cheese, 1/4 tsp. salt, dash of pepper, 1 Tbsp. butter
Directions: Place eggs, cheese, salt and pepper in a covered jar and shake well. Heat butter in skillet until melted over medium heat. Coat skillet with butter. Pour egg-cheese mixture into hot skillet. Cook over medium heat without stirring. Turn with spatula when eggs begin to firm on bottom. Cook 5 to 8 minutes or until eggs are firm. Serve warm.

Title: Egg And Cheese Bake
Ingredients: 1 c. Bisquick, 1 c. cottage cheese (small curd), 1/2 lb. grated Cheddar cheese, 1 tsp. dried or fresh onion, 1 tsp. parsley flakes, 1/4 tsp. salt, 6 eggs, lightly beaten, 1 c. milk, 1/2 c. butter
Directions: Mix ingredients in order given except butter. Melt butter in a 13 x 9-inch baking dish. Pour in cheese/egg mixture, spreading evenly. Bake at 350° for about 40 minutes. (Chopped up ham or cooked bacon pieces can be added to this dish also.)

Title: Cheese And Chilies
Ingredients: 2 eggs, 2 Tbsp. milk, 2 (4 oz.) cans chopped green chilies, drained, 4 oz. Swiss cheese, grated, 4 oz. cheddar cheese, grated, 4 oz. monterey jack cheese, grated
Directions: Beat eggs and milk together. Add green chilies and mix well. Add grated Swiss and cheddar cheeses. Pour into 8x9-inch square pyrex dish. Sprinkle monterey jack cheese on top. Bake at 350° for 30 mins. or until bubbly and brown on top. Serve with crackers.

records.question: dinner ideas with salmon and lemon
records.ground_truth: A recipe featuring salmon as the main protein with lemon as a key flavoring, such as lemon butter salmon, baked lemon salmon, or pan-seared salmon with lemon sauce.
contexts:
Title: Lemon Dill Salmon
Ingredients: 4, 4 to 6 oz. Salmon filets, 2 Tbsp. butter, melted, 1 Tbsp. lemon juice, 1/4 tsp. dillweed, 1/8 tsp. salt, 1/8 tsp. pepper
Directions: Place Salon filets on a greased broiler rack. Combine remaining ingredients and baste filets. Broil 4-inches from heat for 10 minutes per inch of thickness. Baste frequently. Do not turn. Salmon is cooked when it flakes with a fork. Garnish with dillweed leaf.

Title: Grilled Tangy Lime Salmon Steak Recipe
Ingredients: 1 tablespoon Lemon juice, 1 tablespoon Extra Virgin Olive Oil, 500 grams Salmon fillet, 1 tablespoon Paprika powder, Salt - to taste, 2 teaspoons Garlic powder, 1 tablespoon Dijon Mustard, 1 Onion - chopped, 1 tablespoon Whole Black Peppercorns - crushed, 2 tablespoon Lemon zest, 1 tablespoon Sambal oelek, 3 tablespoons Lemon juice
Directions: To begin making the Grilled Tangy Lime Salmon Steak Recipe, preheat the oven to 175 degrees Meanwhile, chop the onions and keep it aside Next take a bowl and add onions, lemon zest, crushed black pepper, garlic powder, olive oil, paprika powder, salt and lemon juice Mix the ingredients well.Place the fish in an oven-proof form and pour the mixture over the salmon If the mixture stays on a salmon in one area use a brush to dispense the lemon bath.When the oven has reached its temperature, put the salmon in the oven It should be in the oven for 15 minutes or until it has a nice light pink color.The next step is to make the sauce for the Salmon In another bowl, add dijon mustard, lemon juice and sambal oelek Mix everything thoroughly.Once the fish is done, take it out and cut it into 4 pieces Serve each piece of fish with a small serving of the sauce on or beside the fish.Serve Grilled Tangy Lime Salmon Steak Recipe along with Roasted Tomato and Pumpkin Soup for a healthy weeknight dinner

Title: Poached Salmon
Ingredients: 4 (5 oz.) fresh or frozen salmon steaks, 5 c. water, 1/3 c. lemon juice, 1/4 tsp. pepper
Directions: Thaw salmon if frozen. In large skillet, combine water, lemon juice and pepper. Bring to a boil. Add salmon. Simmer, covered, for 7 to 10 minutes, until fish flakes easily. Remove salmon from liquid and serve. Serves 4.

Title: Broiled Mustard-Dill Salmon
Ingredients: 1 lb. salmon fillet, 1 lemon, 2 Tbsp. stone ground mustard, 1 Tbsp. chopped fresh dill or 3/4 tsp. dried dill
Directions: Preheat broiler. Set oven rack 4 to 5 inches from element. Rinse fish; pat dry and lay skin side down on a baking sheet. With a zester or grater, remove zest (yellow part of peel only) from lemon; squeeze 1 tablespoon juice from lemon. Mix lemon zest, lemon juice, mustard and dill. Brush mixture over salmon. Broil salmon until opaque in center (about 5 to 6 minutes for 1/2-inch thick fillet), 10 to 12 minutes for 1-inch fillet. Serves 2 to 4. Great for grill, too!

Title: Broiled Salmon With Herbed Lemon Butter
Ingredients: 8 (4 to 6 oz.) salmon fillets, 1/4 c. butter, melted, 2 Tbsp. lemon juice, 2 Tbsp. chopped parsley, 1/4 tsp. dill weed, rosemary or marjoram, crushed, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1/8 tsp. coarsely grounded pepper
Directions: Line broiler pan with foil and place salmon fillets on the well-greased rack. Combine remaining ingredients; baste salmon with mixture. Broil 4 inches from heat, allowing 10 minutes cooking time per inch of thickness measured at its thickest part or until salmon flakes easily when tested with a fork. Do not turn salmon. Baste several times during cooking. Makes 8 servings.

records.question: recipes with leftover rice and vegetables
records.ground_truth: A recipe that uses cooked rice and mixed vegetables, such as fried rice, rice pilaf, stuffed vegetables with rice, or a rice and vegetable casserole.
contexts:
Title: Rice Cereal
Ingredients: leftover rice, brown sugar, milk
Directions: Heat rice in saucepan with a little milk (to make it creamy) and sprinkle with brown sugar to taste. Can also be done in microwave.

Title: Mike'S Fried Rice
Ingredients: 4 to 6 c. steamed white rice, 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil, 1 bunch green onions, 1 (10 oz.) pkg. frozen mixed veggies, 1 to 2 c. leftover meat (barbecue chicken, pork chops, ham, etc.), 2 scrambled eggs, soy sauce, garlic powder, ground ginger
Directions: Heat wok or large frying pan on high. Add oil, then chopped green onions, including most of green parts. Stir-fry for 1 minute. Add leftover meat that has been cubed; stir-fry another minute. Add cooked mixed vegetables; season to taste with garlic powder and ginger. Stir-fry 1 minute more, then add rice and mix well. Add scrambled eggs which have been mashed well with a fork. Sprinkle with soy sauce to taste; stir-fry for 2 more minutes. Enjoy.

Title: 7 Vegetable Mushroom Rice
Ingredients: 2 (15 oz.) cans Veg-All, drained, 2 c. cooked wild or regular rice, 1 can canned, sliced mushrooms, 1 medium onion, finely chopped
Directions: In a saucepan mix vegetables, rice, mushrooms and onions. Over medium heat, heat through, stirring occasionally. Serves 8.

Title: Fried Rice(A Great Main Dish)
Ingredients: 2 to 3 c. leftover cooked meat (chicken, roast, pork, etc.), 1 green onion, chopped, 1 onion, chopped, 3 slices bacon, chopped, 2 eggs, 1 c. sweet peas, 1 small carrot, slivered, 1/4 c. soy sauce, cooked rice (about 2 c. raw), salt and pepper
Directions: Fry bacon pieces. Remove bacon and saute onion, green onion and carrot. Leave crisp. Add meat, peas, salt and pepper. In a separate pan, cook 2 scrambled eggs. Chop eggs and add to meat mixture. Add cooked rice to meat mixture and stir. Add 1/4 c. soy sauce and stir until ready to serve.

Title: Rice
Ingredients: 2 slices bacon, chopped, 1 rib celery, salt, 1/2 onion, 2 to 3 strips green pepper, tomato, if desired, 1 c. rice, 2 c. water or chicken broth
Directions: Fry bacon; add celery, onion, green pepper and tomato and saute. Add rice. Let brown with bacon and vegetables; add water or chicken broth. Cover; let come to boil, turn heat to low and simmer 20 minutes.

records.question: what to make with potatoes and bacon
records.ground_truth: A recipe that combines potatoes and bacon as primary ingredients, such as loaded potato soup, bacon and potato hash, potato gratin with bacon, or a potato and bacon casserole.
contexts:
Title: Dirty Potatoes
Ingredients: 10 strips bacon, 7 potatoes, 4 pieces garlic, 1/2 c. shredded Velveeta cheese
Directions: Fry bacon in pot until crispy. Cut potatoes in cube size pieces. Take bacon out and put cut potatoes in bacon grease; fry potatoes until they start turning brown. Cut garlic into small pieces and saute with potatoes for about a minute. Turn down fire to medium to low.

Title: Not Just Potatoes
Ingredients: 4 to 6 large baking potatoes, 2 to 3 green onions, 4 to 6 slices bacon, garlic salt or powder to taste, salt and pepper to taste, butter or margarine to taste
Directions: Wash potatoes. Cut lengthwise wedge across top of potatoes, 1-inch wide and 1-inch deep. Remove wedge. Place bacon and green onions in corner of wedge. Add butter. Replace wedge and wrap in foil. Bake at 400° for 1 hour or until potato is done.

Title: Southwestern Potatoes
Ingredients: 6 slices bacon, 2 unpeeled large baking potatoes, scrubbed, 3 Tbsp. vegetable oil, 1/2 tsp. garlic salt, 1/8 tsp. black pepper, 1/4 c. barbecue sauce, 1 c. shredded Colby cheese, 1/3 c. sliced green onions, 1/4 c. chopped fresh parsley or 4 tsp. dried parsley, 1/2 c. sour cream (optional)
Directions: Fry bacon until crisp; drain and crumble. Line 2 large baking sheets with foil.

Title: Bacon-Wrapped Baked Potatoes
Ingredients: 4 medium potatoes, salt and pepper, 8 thin slices green pepper, 8 thin slices onion, 2 Tbsp. margarine, 8 slices bacon
Directions: Cut potatoes in half lengthwise. Set aside 4 halves. Place each remaining half on 14 x 14-inch piece of foil. Sprinkle with salt and pepper. Top each half with 2 slices each of green pepper and onions. Dot with 1/2 tablespoon margarine. Top with remaining halves and crisscross two strips of bacon around each. Wrap individually and bake 50 to 60 minutes.

Title: Cowboy Potatoes
Ingredients: 6, 8 potatoes, 6 slices bacon, 1/2 cup onion, chopped, 1/2 cup bell pepper, chopped
Directions: Bake potatoes. Let cool. Peel and cube. In large skillet, fry bacon. Remove bacon and allow to cool, then crumble. Saute onions and peppers in bacon drippings. Add potatoes and stir, heating thoroughly. Add bacon last. Serve while hot.

records.question: meals using shrimp and pasta
records.ground_truth: A recipe that pairs shrimp with pasta as the main components, such as shrimp scampi, shrimp alfredo, garlic butter shrimp pasta, or shrimp and marinara pasta.
contexts:
Title: Shrimp And Pasta
Ingredients: 8 oz. angel hair pasta, 4 Tbsp. vegetable oil, 2 Tbsp. margarine, 1 lb. shrimp, peeled and deveined, 3 cloves garlic, chopped, 1 Tbsp. lemon juice, 2 Tbsp. basil (fresh) or 1 1/2 tsp. dried basil, 1 1/2 tsp. marjoram, 2 Tbsp. parsley, chopped, salt and pepper to taste, grated Parmesan cheese
Directions: Cook pasta according to package. Heat oil and margarine until melted. Cook shrimp and garlic until shrimp is pink. Stir in rest of ingredients. Toss pasta and shrimp mixture until pasta is coated. Add salt and pepper and top with Parmesan cheese. Serves 4.

Title: Shrimp Scampi And Pasta
Ingredients: 2 lb. unpeeled medium shrimp, 1/4 c. chopped green onions, 1/4 c. chopped fresh parsley, 4 cloves garlic, crushed, 3/4 c. butter, melted, 1/2 c. water with chicken bouillon, 2 Tbsp. lemon juice, 3/4 tsp. salt, pepper to taste, cooked pasta
Directions: Peel and devein shrimp. Saute onions, parsley and garlic in butter until tender. Reduce heat to low. Add shrimp. Cook, stirring frequently, 3 to 5 minutes. Add water, lemon juice, salt and pepper. Simmer 3 minutes. Pour over cooked pasta.

Title: Shrimp Pasta
Ingredients: 1 lb. pasta, 1 stick butter, 2 1/2 Tbsp. fresh ginger, 1 1/2 Tbsp. yellow mustard seeds, 1/3 c. dry-roasted cashews (unsalted), 1 1/2 Tbsp. shredded coconut, 1/3 c. chopped cilantro, shrimp, 1/4 c. olive oil, 1 1/2 Tbsp. fresh ginger, 1/3 c. scallions, sliced, 1 1/2 Tbsp. lime juice, salt and pepper, lime wedges and cilantro
Directions: Grate ginger or cut into fine strips. Heat a large frying pan and add butter, 2 1/2 tablespoons ginger, the mustard seeds and cashews. Saut for 2 minutes. Add precooked pasta (use a kind with ridges), coconut and cilantro. Saut over medium heat until hot. Set aside; keep warm. Heat a large frying pan and add oil and 1 1/2 tablespoons ginger. Saut 30 seconds. Add shrimp (use large precooked ones), scallions and lime juice. Saut until hot. Add salt and pepper to taste. Serve over hot pasta and garnish with lime wedges and cilantro.

Title: Spicy Shrimp With Noodles
Ingredients: 8 oz. linguini pasta, 3 Tbsp. butter, 3 Tbsp. olive oil, 1 tsp. crushed red pepper flakes, 1 lb. large shrimp, peeled and deveined, 1 tsp. Cajun seasoning, 1/2 tsp. garlic powder, 1/2 c. sherry, 2 tsp. Italian seasoning, 1/2 c. water, 2 Tbsp. cornstarch, 1/2 c. grated Parmesan cheese
Directions: Prepare pasta according to package directions, while cleaning the shrimp; drain. Melt butter in a medium skillet over low heat. Stir in olive oil and red pepper flakes and raise heat to medium-high. Add shrimp and saute until almost pink. Add Cajun seasoning and garlic powder; saute for 1 minute until fragrant. Add Italian seasoning and sherry; heat until simmering. Dissolve cornstarch in water; add to skillet. Continue to cook, stirring constantly, until thickened. If necessary add small amounts of additional sherry until desired consistency is reached. Top with Parmesan cheese. Serve hot over linguine.

Title: Shrimp And Noodle Bake
Ingredients: 1 box rotini noodles, cooked, 1 to 1 1/2 lb. small shrimp, 3 cans Contadina pasta ready tomatoes, large chunk Feta cheese, small amount olive oil, garlic, chopped (to taste)
Directions: Saute garlic in small amount olive oil. Add shrimp for a few minutes. Add tomatoes and rotini. Put on serving dish and sprinkle with Feta cheese. Serves 8 to 10 people.

records.question: dinner with chicken breast and mushrooms
records.ground_truth: A recipe featuring chicken breast and mushrooms as key ingredients, such as chicken marsala, creamy mushroom chicken, stuffed chicken with mushrooms, or chicken and mushroom stir fry.
contexts:
Title: Chicken And Mushrooms
Ingredients: 1/4 c. butter or margarine, 4 chicken breast halves (skin and bone), 1 c. sliced mushrooms, 2 Tbsp. minced shallots, 1/4 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. pepper, 1 c. shredded Mozzarella cheese
Directions: Melt butter in skillet over medium heat. Add chicken and cook 10 minutes. Turn chicken; add mushrooms and shallots. Sprinkle with salt and pepper. Cook 10 minutes or until tender. Transfer chicken to platter. Sprinkle cheese over chicken; cover and let stand for 5 minutes or until cheese melts.

Title: Baked Chicken With Mushrooms
Ingredients: 6 chicken breasts, 1 can mushrooms, 1/3 c. chopped celery, salt and pepper, 1 can mushroom soup, 1/4 stick butter
Directions: Brown chicken breasts in skillet in 1/4 stick butter on both sides. Remove from skillet and place in baking dish. Add celery, mushrooms and mushroom soup. Add soup can of water. Cover and cook in a 350° oven until tender. Continue to baste chicken so it will not dry out.

Title: The Best Chicken
Ingredients: 3 to 4 boneless chicken breasts, 2 Tbsp. butter, sliced mushrooms to taste (fresh or canned), 1/2 to 1 c. white wine
Directions: Melt butter in frypan. Cut chicken into pieces. Saute in butter until lightly browned. Add sliced mushrooms and salt and pepper to taste. Add wine. Cover pan and simmer 20 to 30 minutes.

Title: Chicken Angelo
Ingredients: 8 oz. fresh mushrooms, sliced and divided, 4 large chicken breast halves, skinned and boned, 2 eggs, beaten, 1 c. bread crumbs, 2 Tbsp. butter, 6 oz. sliced Mozzarella cheese, 3/4 c. chicken broth
Directions: Place half the mushrooms in a 13 x 9 inch baking pan. Dip chicken into beaten eggs and roll in bread crumbs. In skillet, melt butter over medium heat. Brown both sides of chicken in skillet. Place chicken on top of mushrooms. Arrange remaining mushrooms on chicken and top with cheese. Add chicken broth to pan. Bake at 350° for 30-35 minutes. Serve chicken over hot cooked rice or noodles with chopped fresh parsley.

Title: Swiss Mushroom Chicken
Ingredients: 4 boneless, skinless chicken breast halves, 1 egg, 1 c. crushed butter flavored crackers (25), 3/4 tsp. salt, 1/2 lb. fresh mushrooms, sliced, 2 Tbsp. butter or margarine, divided, 4 slices thin ham, 4 slices Swiss cheese
Directions: Flatten chicken to 1/4-inch thick. In a shallow bowl, lightly beat the egg. Combine cracker crumbs and salt in another shallow bowl. Dip chicken in egg, then in crumbs. Set aside. In a large ovenproof skillet, saute mushrooms in 1 tablespoon butter until tender. Remove and set aside. In same skillet, melt remaining butter. Add chicken; cook over medium heat 3 to 4 minutes. Top with ham, mushrooms and cheese. Broil until cheese is melted.

records.question: something with spinach and feta
records.ground_truth: A recipe using spinach and feta cheese as featured ingredients, such as spanakopita, spinach and feta stuffed chicken, spinach feta omelette, or a Greek spinach pie.
contexts:
Title: Boot Scootin' Spinach
Ingredients: 2 pkg. frozen leaf spinach, 1 jar medium Pace salsa, crumbled Feta cheese to taste, 1 c. half and half, 2 Tbsp. butter or margarine
Directions: Precook spinach as directed on package. Drain; then add butter. Add half and half and salsa. Cook until bubbling hot in a large frying pan. Add half and half as needed for consistency. Add crumbled Feta cheese. Let cook down to desired consistency (not too soupy). You may add a touch of garlic, if desired.

Title: Spinach Fettucine
Ingredients: 1/2 lb. fresh spinach, 1 clove minced garlic, 2 Tbsp. chopped onion, 1 stick butter, 1 box fettucine, 1/2 c. heavy cream, 1 c. Parmesan cheese
Directions: Clean spinach, removing stems. Cook garlic, onion and 1/2 stick butter until golden. Add spinach. Cover until wilted. Cook fettucine. Drain. Mix with 1/2 stick butter, cream and cheese. Add spinach mixture.

Title: Spinach, Gorgonzola And Walnuts Over Fettuccine
Ingredients: 2 Tbsp. olive or sesame oil, 1 large clove garlic, minced, 2 c. (4 oz.) torn, stemmed fresh spinach, 2 oz. crumbled Gorgonzola or Feta cheese (1/2 c.), 1/4 c. coarsely chopped walnuts, 6 oz. hot, cooked fettuccine, freshly ground pepper
Directions: Heat oil in large skillet. Add garlic and cook over low heat 5 minutes. Add spinach and cook over medium heat until limp, about 5 minutes, stirring frequently. Stir in cheese and nuts. Add fettuccine and toss well to melt cheese into spinach and pasta. Season well with pepper. Makes 2 servings.

Title: Greek Spinach Pie(Spanakopetes)
Ingredients: 2 pkg. (10 oz. each) whole frozen spinach, 6 Tbsp. olive oil, 6 whole scallions, minced, 1 lb. Feta cheese, 12 oz. pot cheese, 1/2 c. finely chopped fresh parsley, 1/8 tsp. white pepper, 1 tsp. dill, 6 medium eggs, well beaten at room temperature, 1/2 lb. unsalted butter, 1 lb. phyllo, room temperature
Directions: Thaw frozen spinach at room temperature for 2 hours. Drain and chop into small pieces. Heat oil and saute scallions until soft and wilted. Add spinach and simmer until moisture evaporates. Rinse feta in cold water, drain and crumble it into bowl. Blend in pot cheese, parsley, pepper and dill. Add beaten eggs and mix well. Add spinach and scallions and mix well. Butter 11 x 14 x 2-inch pan and line it with about 12 to 15 sheets of phyllo, each sheet individually brushed with warm melted butter. Spread spinach and cheese mixture on top. Cover with about 12 to 15 more individually buttered phyllo sheets on top of one another. Roll or push edges of phyllo down all around the pan to hold in mixture. Brush entire top and edges with warm melted butter.

Title: Spanakopita(Greek Spinach Pie)
Ingredients: 2 boxes frozen chopped spinach, drained, 4 eggs, beaten, 1 onion, chopped fine, 20 sheets filo dough, 1 lb. Feta cheese, crumbled, 2 sticks sweet butter, melted, fresh dill, fresh parsley, 1 lb. cottage cheese
Directions: Brown onion in olive oil. Put browned onion in bowl with spinach (well drained), eggs and cheeses. Mix well. Add salt and pepper (if you like), dill and parsley. Melt butter. Brush 9 x 13-inch pan with butter. Layer filo dough one sheet at a time, buttering each one. Put 10 sheets down. Spread spinach mixture. Cover with 10 more sheets of filo brushing each one with butter. With razor blade or sharp knife, cut through top 10 sheets to cut into pieces. Bake in 350° to 375° oven for 40 to 50 minutes.

records.question: recipes using only pantry staples
records.ground_truth: A recipe made from common pantry ingredients such as canned beans, pasta, rice, canned tomatoes, olive oil, and dried herbs — no fresh produce or meat required.
contexts:
Title: Sugar
Ingredients: 4 c. sugar, 5 Tbsp. finely chopped fresh mandarin peel with white cut off
Directions: Mix these 2 ingredients, store in tightly closed container. This is so nice when served with tea or used in place of plain sugar in dessert recipes. Sprinkle pancakes or waffles with this sugar and quickly caramelize under broiler before serving. Stores for months!

Title: Stickies
Ingredients: 2 loaves frozen bread, 1 stick oleo, 1 c. brown sugar, 2 Tbsp. milk, 1 large vanilla pudding (regular), cinnamon, raisins (optional), nuts (optional)
Directions: Thaw frozen bread but do not let raise. Pick thawed pieces off one loaf of bread and put in greased 9 x 13-inch pan.

Title: Mashed Potato Filling
Ingredients: olive oil, 1 large onion, 2 stalks celery, 2 cloves garlic, dash of poultry seasoning, bag of bread filling or cubes, 4 or 5 large potatoes, 2 beaten eggs, milk, butter
Directions: Saute in olive oil onion, celery, garlic and poultry seasoning. Mix with bread.

Title: Corn Meal Mush(A High-Protein Alternative To Pancakes.)
Ingredients: 3 c. water, 1 c. fine corn flour, 1 c. corn meal or coarse corn flour, salt to taste
Directions: The night before: Bring water and salt to boil in a large pot; remove from heat. Slowly add corn flours while stirring. Return to heat; cook over low heat until very stiff. Let cool to touch. Shape into a block about 4 inches high. Wrap in foil or plastic wrap and refrigerate.

Title: Fresh Banana Or Strawberry Pancakes
Ingredients: 2 c. Bisquick, 2 eggs, 1 3/4 c. milk, 1/2 c. fresh bananas or strawberries
Directions: Mix well together and fry until golden brown. If any leftover place between wax paper and freeze. To reheat: unwrap and place in microwave on high until hot to the touch. Makes about 12 pancakes

records.question: vegetarian pasta
records.ground_truth: A pasta recipe that contains no meat or seafood, using vegetables, cheese, or plant-based proteins as the main components.
contexts:
Title: Garden Vegetable Pasta
Ingredients: 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil, 1/2 c. sliced mushrooms, 2 green onions, sliced, 1/8 tsp. garlic powder or 1 clove garlic, minced, 1 can mixed vegetables, drained, 1 c. cherry tomatoes, sliced in half, 1/2 c. half and half, 1/2 c. grated Parmesan, 2 tsp. basil leaves, 2 c. cooked spaghetti
Directions: In a 10-inch skillet over medium heat in hot oil, cook mushrooms and green onions with garlic until tender and liquid is evaporated, stirring often. Stir in mixed vegetables, tomatoes, half and half, cheese and basil. Add spaghetti. Heat through, stirring occasionally.

Title: Vegetarian Tomato Spaghetti Sauce
Ingredients: 1 large onion, chopped, 2 cloves garlic, 2 Tbsp. cooking oil, 1 (28 oz.) can tomatoes, 1 c. water, 1 (6 oz.) can tomato paste, 2 beef bouillon cubes, 1 tsp. dried oregano, 1/2 tsp. dried basil, 1/8 tsp. pepper, 1 bay leaf, 1/4 c. red cooking wine, mushrooms, zucchini, yellow squash, carrots, green pepper, okra and celery
Directions: Saute onion and garlic in cooking oil. Add chopped tomatoes, water, paste, bouillon, spices and cooking wine. Simmer. Chop vegetables, using whichever vegetables you prefer. Add generous amounts to sauce. Simmer 2 to 3 hours, stirring occasionally. Serve hot over pasta.

Title: Garden Vegetables With Pasta
Ingredients: 3 c. (8 oz.) rotini, 2 c. chopped broccoli, 1 (8 oz.) jar Cheez Whiz process cheese spread, 2 Tbsp. milk, 1 c. cherry tomato halves, 1/4 c. green onion slices, 1/8 tsp. pepper
Directions: Cook pasta according to package directions, adding broccoli to water last 2 minutes of cooking time; drain well. Add process cheese spread and milk to pasta mixture in saucepan. Cook over low heat, stirring, until process cheese melts. Stir in remaining ingredients. Makes 4 to 6 servings.

Title: Feta Veggie Pasta
Ingredients: 1 lb. rotini, 3 oz. sun dried tomatoes (dry), 2 1/2 c. broccoli, chopped, 1 medium red pepper, chopped, 4 gloves chopped garlic or to taste, 1/2 c. olive oil, 1 tsp. parsley, 10 oz. Feta cheese
Directions: Soak sun dried tomatoes in warm water for 30 minutes. Cook rotini as directed (al dente). Cook chopped broccoli in microwave on High for 4 minutes. Add red pepper and chopped sun dried tomatoes to broccoli. Cook 1 minute in microwave. Saute chopped garlic in oil until hot. Add vegetables, chopped Feta cheese and garlic and oil to rotini. Cover with parsley and serve.

Title: One Pot Vegetable Pasta With Beans Recipe
Ingredients: Salt - as required, 2 teaspoons Extra Virgin Olive Oil, 3-1/2 cups Vegetable stock, 1 Green Bell Pepper (Capsicum) - cut into thin strips, 5 cloves Garlic - minced, 1 Red onion - sliced, 1 cup Tomatoes - canned, 1/2 cup Spinach Leaves (Palak), Red Chilli flakes - A pinch (optional), 1/4 cup Cheese - plus more for topping (optional), 1 cup Pasta  Fusilli - or any pasta you like, 1 Green zucchini - chopped, 1 tablespoon Italian seasoning, 1 cup Black beans - drained and rinsed
Directions: To begin making the One Pot Vegetable Pasta with Beans recipe, heat oil in a skillet add minced garlic and fry for half a minute till it starts turning light brown.Add all the vegetables including onions, tomatoes, bell pepper, zucchini and spinach Let it cook for about 5 to 6 minutes.Add in the pasta, vegetable stock, seasoning into the pan Stir, cover, and bring to a rolling boil.Cover the pan, reduce heat to medium-low and cook it for about 12-15 minutes, stirring occasionally There should be 1/4 to 1/2 inch of liquid in the bottom of the pot when it is done.Remove from heat and stir in the black beans and cheese (optional) Let it rest for 5 minutes to warm the beans, melt the cheese, and absorb the excess liquid.Serve One Pot Vegetable Pasta With Beans with Minestrone Soup and a glass of wine for a light and healthy weekend dinner

records.question: gluten-free dinner
records.ground_truth: A dinner recipe that contains no gluten — no wheat, barley, rye, or regular flour — suitable for someone with celiac disease or gluten intolerance.
records.answer: Millet Pea Khichdi (Gluten Free Breakfast Recipe)
contexts:
Title: Millet Pea Khichdi (Gluten Free Breakfast Recipe)
Ingredients: 1 Tomato - chopped finely, 1 teaspoon Turmeric powder (Haldi), 1/2 teaspoon Mustard seeds, 1 teaspoon Ginger Garlic Paste, 1 teaspoon Red Chilli powder, 1 teaspoon Coriander Powder (Dhania), 1 cup Bajra Flour ( Pearl Millet), 1/2 teaspoon Garam masala powder, 1 Potato (Aloo) - cubed, 2 tablespoon Coriander (Dhania) Leaves - chopped finely, 1/2 cup Yellow Moong Dal (Split), 1 tablespoon Sunflower Oil, 1/4 teaspoon Asafoetida (hing), 1 Onion - chopped finely, 1 Carrot (Gajjar) - cubed, 1/2 teaspoon Salt, 1/4 cup Green peas (Matar), 1/2 teaspoon Cumin seeds (Jeera), 1/2 Lemon
Directions: To prepare Bajra Matar Ki Khichdi, soak bajra in water for about 4 hours or overnight Soak moong dal in water for about an hour.In a Pressure cooker, add soaked bajra, moong dal, green chilies and turmeric powder Add 4 cups of water and cook over medium flame for 4 whistles Ensure water is added more to get the creamy consistency Bajra takes time to cook, hence cook for 4 -5 whistles depending on the pressure cooker Set aside.Meanwhile, chop all the vegetables required for Bajra Matar Ki Khichdi.In a Kadai, add oil and heat over medium flame.Once the oil is hot, add cumin seeds, mustard seeds, hing and cook until the seeds clutter Cook until the cumin seeds become light brownish.Add onions and cook until they become translucent.Add tomatoes and cook until they become mushy.Now, stir in the chopped vegetables and combine them wellAdd red chili powder, coriander powder, garam masala, required salt and cook until the vegetables become soft and cooked.Combine the vegetable mixture with the gluten free bajra-dal mixture.Combine the until they are blended together and cook over low flame for about 3-4 minutesSwitch off the flame and garnish with coriander leaves.Add lime juice to the khichdi at the time of serving.Serve Khichdi warmly with pickle of your choice

Title: Cauliflower Tortilla Recipe
Ingredients: 1 Cauliflower (gobi), 1 teaspoon Black pepper powder, 1 Whole Egg, Salt - to taste
Directions: To begin making the Cauliflower Tortilla Recipe, wash the cauliflower head and cut them into large florets.Grate the florets and place the grated cauliflower in perforated plate and steam in a steamer for about 15 minutes Once the grated cauliflower florets are steamed, allow them to cool.While it is cooking, preheat the oven to 180 degree centigrade.Once cauliflower has cooled spoon the cooked cauliflower in center of a cloth and wring out the water You need to remove as much moisture as possible from the cauliflower.Transfer the dry cauliflower into a clean dry bowl Add egg, salt and pepper powder, whisk well to combine.Transfer one portion of the mixture, onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper (a good quality one) Spread the mixture with your fingers into tortilla shape You can make the cauliflower tortillas thick or thin as per your preference.Bake the cauliflower tortillas in the preheated oven for about 10 minutes Then flip the tortillas and continue to bake for another 7 to 8 minutes.Once they're done place them on a wire rack to cool.Serve the Cauliflower Tortillas topped with your favorite filling and serve immediately for a wholesome gluten free weeknight dinner.Here is the recipe to make a Soy Bhurji Filling: To make soya bhurji filling, first heat oil in a pan, add onions and saute until they turn translucent Next add ginger garlic paste and cook till the saw smell of the paste is gone.Add green chilies and tomatoes and cook till tomatoes are soft.Add red chili powder, coriander powder, turmeric powder, roasted cumin powder and salt mix well Finally add soya granules (pre soaked in water) Cook for 5 minutes on low heat That’s it, Soy Bhurji is ready!These Cauliflower tortillas can be used to make Soft Taco With Mushroom and Roasted Bell pepper Sauce Recipe or Tacozza - Tacos with Refried Beans and Oregano

Title: Gluten Free Samosa Recipe
Ingredients: 4 Rice paper rolls, 1 tablespoon Garam masala powder, Salt - to taste, 1 teaspoon Cumin seeds (Jeera), 2 tablespoon Butter, 2 Potatoes (Aloo), 1/2 cup Green peas (Matar) - boiled, 1 Onion
Directions: To begin making the Gluten Free Samosa recipe, peel, dice and boil the potatoes Mash the potatoes and keep it aside in a bowl.Heat up butter in a pan and splutter the cumin seeds and then fry the diced onions Cook till the onions are soft and translucent Add the cooked onion and spices, salt to the potatoes Mix until well blended.Add the boiled peas into the potato and keep it aside Preheat your oven to 425 F.Fill a large bowl 1/4 full with water Place the rice paper into the water one sheet at a time Soak for 1-2 minutes  until it becomes soft.Place the softened rice paper onto the counter and place 1- 2 tablespoon of potato mixture onto the center Fold the bottom up first, then fold the sides in, fold the top down last Follow the same steps for all the samosa Place onto a well-oiled pan, brush the samosa with oil as well.Bake them for 20 to 25 minutes turning a few times throughout Serve hot.Serve Gluten Free Samosa along with Dhaniya Pudina Chutney and Masala Chai or your tea break

Title: Gluten Free Rajgira Barfi Recipe
Ingredients: 1/2 cup Jaggery, 1/4 cup Cashew nuts - halved, 1/2 teaspoon Cardamom Powder (Elaichi), 1/2 cup Rajgira Flour (Amaranth Flour), 1/2 cup Ghee - melted
Directions: To begin making the Gluten Free Rajgira Burfi Recipe, dry roast the rajgira/amaranth flour in a heavy bottomed pan till the color changes to a light golden brown Remove from the flame and set aside.Grease a flat plate with ghee and keep aside.Roast the halved cashewnuts in a little ghee until crisp and golden brown Take care to do it on low heat to roast it evenly.Next combine the jaggery and 1/4 cup water in a heavy bottomed pan and place over low heat (the amount of water should be just enough to soak the jaggery or sugar) Make a syrup of half thread consistency.To the jaggery syrup, add the roasted flour and powdered cardamom and mix well.Keep stirring continuously Add the melted ghee little at a time while stirring the mixture (if you find that the mixture is sticking to the pan, add more ghee than mentioned in the recipe)When the Rajgira Burfi  mixture starts leaving the sides and bottom of the pan, turn off the heat Pour this mixture immediately on to the greased tray and spread it evenly for it to set.Sprinkle the roasted cashewnuts on top and press gently while the Rajgira Burfi mixture is still hot.Allow the Rajgira Burfi to cool and then cut into desired sizes and shapes Store the Rajgira Burfi in an airtight box for a week.Serve Gluten-Free Rajgira Burfi for Diwali, Raksha Bandhan or any other special occasion in the family Serve Gluten Free Rajgira Burfi Recipe after your everyday meal of Palak Dal, Bharwa Bhindi, Phulka and Lauki Raita

Title: Cauliflower Crust Pizza With Pesto, Sundried Tomatoes & Goat Cheese
Ingredients: 1 Cauliflower (gobi) - cleaned and florets separated, 2 Whole Eggs - beaten, 1/4 cup Homemade Marinara Sauce, 1 teaspoon Garlic powder, Salt - to taste, 1/4 cup Homemade Basil Pesto, 1/2 cup Parmesan cheese - grated, 1 teaspoon Red Chilli flakes, 1/2 cup Mozzarella cheese - grated, 1/2 cup Sun Dried Tomatoes - chopped, Mozzarella cheese - and goat cheese (optional) for toppings, 1 teaspoon Onion powder, 1 teaspoon Dried basil leaves, 1 teaspoon Dried oregano
Directions: To begin making Cauliflower Crust Pizza With Pesto, Sundried Tomatoes & Goat Cheese, add the cauliflower florets to a food processor and pulse to form fine crumbs (working in batches).Once the cauliflower is made into a crumble, place it in a muslin cloth and drain the excess liquid from processed cauliflower by squeezing well Make sure to squeeze out the maximum liquid possible.Add the cauliflower pulp to a medium bowl and add in eggs, mozzarella, parmesan, oregano, basil, red chili flakes, garlic powder, onion powder with required salt and mix well.Preheat oven to 220 C.Line the pizza stone or a baking sheet with parchment paper Add the prepared cauliflower mixture and spread evenly like pizza dough.Bake this in the oven for 20 minutes or until slightly brown on the top Remove the prepared gluten free cauliflower pizza crust from the oven.Spread the marinara sauce, spinach basil pesto, sun dried tomatoes, mozzarella and goat cheese.Place the Cauliflower Pizza Crust back into the oven and bake again for about 7 minutes or until cheese melts evenly Serve the Cauliflower Crust Pizza With Pesto, Sundried Tomatoes & Goat Cheese for a weekend dinner along with Light and Creamy Broccoli Soup and Strawberry Upside Down Muffin

records.question: vegan chocolate cake
records.ground_truth: A chocolate cake recipe that contains no animal products — no eggs, dairy milk, butter, or honey — using plant-based substitutes throughout.
records.answer: Vegan Chocolate Mocha Banana Cake Recipe
contexts:
Title: Vegan Chocolate Mocha Banana Cake Recipe
Ingredients: 1 teaspoon Baking soda, 1/2 cup Chocolate chips, 1/4 teaspoon Salt, 1 teaspoon Vanilla Extract, 1 teaspoon Instant Coffee Powder, 1/2 cup Ripe Bananas - mashed, 1/3 cup Sunflower Oil, 1 cup Water - (adjust), 1 teaspoon Vinegar, 1/4 cup Cocoa Powder, 1-2/3 cups Whole Wheat Flour, 3/4 cup Brown Sugar (Demerara Sugar)
Directions: To begin making Vegan Chocolate Mocha Banana Cake Recipe, get prepped with all the ingredients Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit or 180 degrees Centigrade.Prepare an 8 inch or 9 inch pan; grease and flour or line with aluminum foil and then grease and flour Keep aside.Mash bananas and gather the ingredients for the cake.In a large bowl, add whole wheat flour, sugar, cocoa powder, coffee powder, baking soda and salt Mix well with a wire whisk or sift the mixture well.To this, add oil, vanilla essence, vinegar, and 3/4 cup water Stir well with a silicone spatula or spoon.Fold in mashed bananas If you feel the batter is a bit thick, add more water; up to 1 cup to get a medium thick pouring consistency.Pour into prepared pan and smoothen to level the top Sprinkle with chocolate chips.Bake in preheated oven for 35 to 40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in center comes out clean.Remove from oven and place on cooling rack.After 10 minutes, remove cake from foil and cool on wire rack completely.When cool, cut into desired shapes and enjoy with a cup of coffee/tea or with a scoop of your favorite ice cream!!You can serve Vegan Chocolate Mocha Banana Cake Recipe, with Apple Cinnamon Soy Smoothie Recipe and Maharashtrian Kanda Poha Recipe as an after school light meal for an energy booster

Title: Vanilla Choco Mousse Recipe With Chocolate Chips
Ingredients: 1 teaspoon Sugar, 100 grams Heavy whipping cream, 2 tablespoon Chocolate chips, 1/2 cup Water, 1 teaspoon Vanilla Extract, 1 + 1 teaspoon Instant Coffee Powder, 200 grams Chocolate Cake - plain or frosted, 100 grams Chocolate ganache
Directions: To prepare Vanilla Choco Mousse Recipe with chocolate chips start by cutting the Chocolate Cake into small pieces or crumbling it with hand.Here's how ro make a Eggless Easy Chocolate Cake Recipe - Vegan OptionTake a bowl and add vanilla extract to whipped cream This makes the vanilla cream Keep asideTake a saucepan and heat water in it on medium flame After water gets hot add 1 teaspoon coffee powder and 1 teaspoon sugar to it When sugar gets dissolved turn off the flame and allow it to cool completely.Now take a glass and first put a thin layer of vanilla cream followed by the layer of cake.On the layer of cake and put little bit coffee syrup (around 1/2 teaspoon per layer of chocolate cake).Now put a layer of vanilla cream followed by a teaspoon of chocolate chips.Continue this process and make about 4 more layers.Lastly, sprinkle coffee powder with the help of a sieve.Set this glass for 1 hr in the fridge Vanilla Choco Mousse With Chocolate Chips is now ready to serve.Serve Vanilla Choco Mousse Recipe as a dessert after a meal of Lemony Pasta Recipe With Roasted Shrimps or Penne Pasta Recipe In Creamy Cauliflower Sauce with Cheese Garlic Bread Recipe

Title: Vegan Hot Chocolate Recipe
Ingredients: 1 liter Soy milk - or almond milk, 1 tablespoon Vanilla Extract, 1/4 cup Cocoa Powder, 60 grams Chocolate Bar - dairy free, 1 pinch Salt, 1/4 cup Cane sugar - or coconut sugar
Directions: To prepare Vegan hot Chocolate Recipe, get prep with all the ingredients first.In a Saucepan add cocoa powder, cane sugar, salt, vanilla and 1/2 cup of soy milk into a Blender and whisk until ingredients have combined smoothly Now whisk in the remaining soy milk (or almond milk).Turn on the heat and slowly bring it to a boil and turn off the heat and drop the dairy free chocolate (if using) and stir.Alternately, break chocolate and divide into 4 cups (optional), pour the hot chocolate into the cups.Serve vegan hot chocolate recipe with Pretzel salad or Whole Wheat Banana Bread Recipe (with Eggless & Vegan Options) during evening

Title: Eggless Boston Cream Cupcake Recipe - Vegan Option
Ingredients: 25 gram Butter, 2 tablespoon Sunflower Oil, 1 tablespoon Sugar, Badam (Almond) - few roast & coarsely ground, 1/2 teaspoon Baking powder, 1 pinch Salt, 2 tablespoon Custard powder, 100 gram Dark chocolate - compound, 1 Ripe Bananas, 20 ml Coconut milk - or milk, 50 grams Sugar, 80 ml Coconut milk - or milk, 1/4 teaspoon Baking soda, 100 grams All Purpose Flour (Maida) - or gluten free flour
Directions: To prepare baking Eggless Boston Cream Cupcake, start by making a dry mix by sieving the flour, baking powder, soda and salt, to make sure all ingredients are mixed well.Cream together butter, sugar, oil and milk (20ml) To make it vegan, add coconut milk instead of milk.Add the wet mixture of cream to the flour and other mixed dry ingredients Pour little by little and slowly fold till you have a lump-free mix.Pour the batter into Cupcake molds and bake in a Oven at 170 degrees Celsius for 8 minutes.Let the cupcakes cool completely on a wire rack before filling the custard and glazing.Now for the custard, just mix in the custard powder and milk and bring to a boil Let it cool completely.Meanwhile, in a double boiler, add dark chocolate compound with about a teaspoon of oil and a pinch of salt till the chocolate looks perfectly melted Make sure no water from the double boiler goes to the chocolate.Once the cupcakes have cooled, slice them into half or you can also core them and fill with the custard with the help of a piping bag.Let the custard stuffed cupcakes rest in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before proceeding to the next step.After half hour or more, glaze the cupcakes by dripping the chocolate we prepared and sprinkle some almonds, coarsely ground, and there the perfect Eggless Boston Cream Cupcake Recipe (With Vegan Option) is ready.Serve Eggless Boston Cream Cupcake Recipe (With Vegan Option) with Healthy Vegetable Fries Recipe or over a coffee mocha for an interesting evening

Title: Death-By-Chocolate
Ingredients: 1 pkg. devil's food cake mix, 3 pkg. sugar-free chocolate pudding, 3 chocolate bars, 1 large lite non-aerosol whipped topping
Directions: Bake cake according to directions; cool. Cut into squares. Line trifle bowl. Add layers of cooked chocolate pudding, whipped topping and Krackel alternating with the cake. Whipped topping should form "ribbons" visible from outside the bowl. Chill and serve.

records.question: vegetarian indian food
records.ground_truth: An Indian recipe that contains no meat or seafood, such as dal, chana masala, palak paneer, aloo gobi, or vegetable biryani.
contexts:
Title: Vegan Navratan Korma Recipe
Ingredients: 2 tablespoon Ginger Garlic Paste, 10 Cashew nuts - whole, 6-8 Saffron strands, 6 Green Chillies, 1/2 cup Cauliflower (gobi) - cut into florets, 2 tablespoons Raisins, Coconut Oil - cold pressed, 1/2 cup Tofu - diced, 1 tablespoon Badam (Almond) - sliced, Edible Silver Foil/Leaf (Chandi Ka Vark) - optional, 2 Carrots (Gajjar) - diced small, 3-4 Cardamom (Elaichi) Pods/Seeds - powdered, 1/2 Garam masala powder - optional, 1 tablespoon Pistachios - sliced, 2 Potatoes (Aloo) - boiled and diced, 2 Onions - sliced, 1/2 cup Coconut milk - thick, 1 cup Coconut Yogurt - optional, 1 Black cardamom (Badi Elaichi), 3 Cloves (Laung), 1/2 teaspoon Red Chilli powder, Mint Leaves (Pudina) - as needed, Pineapple - few pieces, 1/2 teaspoon Turmeric powder (Haldi), 1 inch Ginger, 15 Badam (Almond), 1-1/2 tablespoons Poppy seeds, 10 to 12 Green beans (French Beans) - cut into 1 inch pieces, 6-8 Cashew nuts - toasted
Directions: To begin making the Vegan Navratan Korma, soak cashews and almonds reserved for the paste in water for 40 minutes Grind this to a smooth paste along with poppy seeds and set aside.Chop all the vegetables and gather all the ingredients required for the korma.Steam the vegetables with a pinch of salt until tender, make sure they hold the shape.Grind the poppy seeds, cashew and almonds into a smooth paste, adding little water Keep the nut-seed mixture aside.In a large pan heat some oil, add cloves, cinnamon, green cardamom and black cardamom, now add sliced onions, ginger and garlic paste and saute this the raw smell disappears, add green chillies and cook briefly Let this mixture cool down to room temperature.Now add these ingredients into a mixie jar and grind to smooth.Return this gravy into the pan add turmeric powder, red chilli powder and some salt and cook for 3-4 minutes.Now to this mixture add the coconut yogurt, coconut milk and the nut-seed paste and mix to well and cook for 4-5 minutes or until the korma thickens.Add the cooked vegetables, tofu and a cup of water and cook until the korma comes together This should take around 4-5 minutes Add little water to loosen the korma if required Add salt and adjust the seasoning Finally sprinkle the garam masala if using and give it a stir.In a small pan heat some coconut oil and gently fry cashews and sultanas, turn off the heat add sliced almonds and pistachios and roast for a few seconds Spoon the Vegan Navratan Korma into a serving bowl, place the chandi ka varq if using, top it with cashews, sultanas, almonds and pistachios Now arrange slices of pineapple, saffron and mint leaves on top.Serve the Vegan Navratan Korma along with a Paneer Pulao with Green Peas and Tadka Raita Recipe (Spiced Curd With Onions) to make a delicious weeknight dinner or even serve as a main course for parties

Title: Vegan Malai Cabbage Recipe
Ingredients: 2 teaspoons Kasuri Methi (Dried Fenugreek Leaves), 1 Green Chilli, 2 teaspoons Sunflower Oil, 2 cloves Garlic, 1/4 cup Cashew nuts - ground to a fine paste, Salt - to taste, 1/2 teaspoon Black pepper powder, 1 inch Ginger, 1/4 cup Coconut milk, 1/2 teaspoon Garam masala powder, 1 Green Chilli - sliced for garnish, 2 Cloves (Laung), 1 Bay leaf (tej patta), Cardamom Powder (Elaichi) - a pinch, 1 Onion - roughly chopped, 2 cups Cauliflower (gobi) - cut into florets
Directions: To begin making Vegan Malai Gobhi Recipe, clean and cut the cauliflower into small florets Soak it in warm water with little salt to de-worm and keep aside.Make a fine paste of cashew with little water using a mixer grinder and keep aside.Heat oil in a heavy bottomed pan, add cloves, bay leaf and let the oil become fragrant.Make a fine paste of onion, ginger, garlic and green chilli using a blender and add it to the pan Let it cook until the raw smell goes away.Drain the cauliflower florets from the warm water and add it to the pan Saute for a minute.Add the garam masala, cardamom and pepper powder, 1 cup water and let the cauliflower florets cook to 3/4 the with the lid closed This will take about 8 to 10 minutes.Add the cashew paste, season with salt and simmer for 2 minutes.Add the coconut milk and adjust the consistency by adding little water and let it simmer for 5 minutes and switch off the heat.Slightly crush the kasuri methi between your palms and add it to the malai gobhi along with the green chillies as a garnish.Serve the Vegan Malai Gobhi Recipe, along with Phulkas and Tomato Onion Cucumber Raita for the weekday lunch or dinner

Title: Veggie Rava Idli (Recipe In Hindi)
Ingredients: 1/2 tablespoon chana dal, 1 cup yogurt, 1/2 cup green peas, 1/2 cup sweet corn, 1 tablespoon oil, salt - to taste, 10 curry leaves, 4 green chillies - finely chopped, 1 teaspoon red chilli flakes, 1 cup water, 1/2 cup coriander - finely chopped Hua, 1-1 / 2 cup semolina, 1 teaspoon ino fruit salt, 1/2 cup carrots - grated, 1 tablespoon mustard, 1 ginger - grated
Directions: To make Vegetable Rava Idli, firstly mix semolina, curd and water in a large bowl Mix it well After this, add corn, carrot, peas, ginger, coriander and salt Mix them and keep aside Now heat the oil in a small pan When it gets slightly hot, add mustard seeds, chana dal, curry leaves and chili flakes Keep it aside for a few seconds Now add the tempering to the semolina and mix it well Before stirring the idli, add the fruit salt and mix it Now apply some oil on the idli steamer and fill the idli mixture in it Steam it for at least 12 to 15 minutes and serve hot

Title: Vegan Kofta Curry Recipe
