Ingredients: 4 Tomatoes - blanched, 1 teaspoon Red Chilli powder, Coriander (Dhania) Leaves - for garnish (as required), 1/2 teaspoon Cumin powder (Jeera), 8 Cashew nuts - soaked in warm water for 30 minutes, 1 teaspoon Ginger Garlic Paste, 1 teaspoon Green Chilli Paste, 2 teaspoon Rice flour, Salt - to taste, 1 teaspoon Garam masala powder, 2 Onions - roughly chopped, 1/4 cup Bottle gourd (lauki) - grated, 1/4 cup Beetroot - grated, 1/2 teaspoon Amchur (Dry Mango Powder) - optional, 1/2 teaspoon Sugar, 2 tablespoon Multigrain flour - or besan, 1/2 teaspoon Coriander Powder (Dhania), 1 tablespoon Sunflower Oil, Sunflower Oil - for frying (as required), 1/4 cup Carrot (Gajjar) - grated, 1/4 cup Green zucchini - grated, 1 teaspoon Cumin seeds (Jeera), 1/4 cup Tofu - grated, 1/4 cup Cabbage (Patta Gobi/ Muttaikose) - grated, 1/4 teaspoon Asafoetida (hing)
Directions: To begin making the Vegan Kofta curry recipe, first add all the ingredients under ‘For the koftas’ except oil in a mixing bowl.Mix and make lime sized balls of the mixture (adjust the amount of besan if required, so that the mixture is easy to handle)Heat oil in a wok and deep fry the koftas till golden brown.Take out with a slotted spoon and drain on absorbent paper Alternatively, shallow fry in appe patra/paniyaram pan with a drizzle of oil till it is evenly browned, flipping once in between.To make the gravy- Blend the onion, tomato, cashew nuts separately in a Blender to a fine pasteHeat oil in a Kadai Add the cumin seeds Once they sizzle add the onion and ginger garlic paste.Fry, stirring continuously till the paste turns brown.Add the tomato paste and cook till the water evaporates and you can see the oil oozing out.Add garam masala, red chilli powder and mix Saute for a few seconds.Add the cashew paste, sugar and salt.Mix and add enough water to get the desired consistencyBoil the gravy for a couple of minutes.To serve, pour the gravy in a serving bowl Place the koftas in it and garnish Vegan Kofta curry recipe with fresh coriander leaves.Serve Vegan Kofta curry recipe with Tandoori Roti or Naan for dinner

Title: Vegan Soya Aloo Curry Recipe
Ingredients: 1 teaspoon Kashmiri Red Chilli Powder, Salt - as required, 1/2 teaspoon Turmeric powder (Haldi), 1 tablespoon Coriander Powder (Dhania), Sunflower Oil - as required, 4 Potatoes (Aloo) - cubed, 1 teaspoon Garam masala powder, 1 teaspoon Cumin seeds (Jeera), 1/2 teaspoon Kasuri Methi (Dried Fenugreek Leaves) - crushed, Coriander (Dhania) Leaves - few, 1 teaspoon Ginger - grated, 1 Onion - chopped finely, 1/4 teaspoon Asafoetida (hing), 1 cup Soy Chunks (Nuggets) - cooked in water, 2 Green Chillies - chopped, 1/2 teaspoon Red Chilli powder, 1 tablespoon Garlic - chopped
Directions: To begin with Vegan Soya Aloo Curry, firstly boil enough water in a pan, add the tomatoes, let it sit, remove the skin and chop them finely.Heat oil in a Kadhai, add the asafoetida powder, cumin seeds, fry it.Add the grated ginger, chopped garlic, chopped onions, cook until the onions turns translucent Once it is done, add the potatoes, all the spice powders and salt.Cook everything for few minutes and then add the chopped tomatoes, slit opened green chillies and cook it for another 2-3 minutes.Finally add the soya chunks, cook for few minutes, add water as per need.Serve Vegan Soya Aloo Curry with Whole Wheat Lachha Paratha or Achari Masala Puri

records.question: low carb chicken dinner
records.ground_truth: A chicken recipe that is low in carbohydrates — no pasta, rice, bread, or starchy vegetables as main components — suitable for a low-carb or keto diet.
contexts:
Title: Chicken Skillet Dinner
Ingredients: 2 chicken breast halves, 1/2 c. sliced carrots, 1/2 c. sliced celery, 1/2 c. green beans, oil, 1/2 c. chicken broth, 2 tsp. cornstarch
Directions: Brown chicken in oil until lightly browned; remove from pan. Add vegetables and stir for 2 or 3 minutes. Add chicken broth mixed with cornstarch to pan. Return chicken to pan. Cover and cook slowly for 20 minutes. Serves 2.

Title: Silver Diet Dinner For Two
Ingredients: 2 chicken pieces, 2 large carrots, sliced, 1 c. green beans, 1 medium onion, sliced, 1 large potato, cut into wedges
Directions: Place 1 chicken piece and half of the remaining ingredients on each of 2 foil squares. Seal tightly. Place in casserole. Bake at 350° for 45 to 60 minutes or until chicken is tender.

Title: Simply Easy Chicken(It Really Is!)
Ingredients: 1 chicken breast half per person (boneless and skinless), your favorite Italian dressing *
Directions: *Do not use fat-free or any of the diet dressings.

Title: Chicken Bake(Low Calorie)
Ingredients: 8 oz. nonfat plain yogurt, 1 c. crushed seasoned croutons, pepper to taste, garlic to taste (extra), 2 pkg. (6) skinless and boneless chicken thighs or 4 to 6 skinless and boneless chicken breasts
Directions: Mix plain yogurt (small cup) with garlic powder to taste. Cut several chicken breasts into cubes. Dip in yogurt mix and in wheat germ or oat bran that has poultry seasoning and 1 teaspoon salt. Bake on a cookie sheet at 425° for 25 minutes. Dip in honey mustard or barbecue sauce or yogurt with curry powder and sugar-onion powder.

Title: Lo-Cal Breaded Chicken
Ingredients: 1 (8 oz.) lo-cal Ranch dressing, 3-4 boneless, skinless chicken breasts, 1 cup bread crumbs, 1 Tbsp. onion powder, 1 Tbsp. parsley flakes, 1/2 Tbsp. garlic powder, Salt & Pepper to taste
Directions: Rinse and drain chicken. Mix together on a plate, bread crumbs and spices. Pour 1/2 bottle of dressing on a plate. Dip chicken in dressing and then into bread crumbs. Turn to coat both sides. Place on a shallow baking dish and cover with foil. Bake at 350 400 degrees for approximately 1 1/2 hours. Uncover the last 15 minutes to brown.

records.question: kosher beef recipe
records.ground_truth: A beef recipe that follows kosher dietary laws — no mixing of meat and dairy, using kosher-certified beef, prepared without forbidden ingredients.
contexts:
Title: Sauerbraten (Or Beef Stroganoff)
Ingredients: 3 to 4 lb. beef chuck pot roast, 2 cloves fresh garlic, sliced, 5 to 6 Tbsp. whole wheat flour, 1/2 c. white vinegar, 2 c. water, 2 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. black pepper, 4 onions, cube-chopped approximately 1/2-inch, 1 large bunch celery (leaves and tops only), chopped, 1/4 c. all-purpose flour, 2 Tbsp. safflower oil, 1/2 qt. pkg. instant powdered skim milk, 3 Tbsp. minced parsley (fresh or dried)
Directions: Score meat by pushing a knife through it at an approximate right angle to the meat fibers, in rows about 1-inch apart. Turn and score the other side, making slits between those already made. Place slices of garlic deeply into the meat. Place meat on wax paper and dredge well with 5 or 6 tablespoons whole wheat flour. The floured surface will brown as readily without fat as with it. Place meat in a large skillet or Dutch oven. Brown meat well on both sides; keep heat moderate, taking approximately 20 minutes. Place onions, celery tops, vinegar, water, salt and pepper around it and simmer slowly for 3 1/2 to 5 hours, adding water if needed, until very tender. Place in deep serving platter. Remove any fat and cut or slice into serving size pieces. Remove fat from broth. Increase broth with water to approximately 2 cups. Add the chopped parsley. Mix the oil and flour together and spoon in some of the broth until it is thin enough to add to the broth in the pan. Stir over low heat until the broth is thickened. Sprinkle the instant powdered milk over the gravy and stir in. Taste for salt. Spoon the gravy over and around the meat or serve in a separate bowl. Serve with small, steamed red potatoes, sprinkled with chopped parsley, and mixed vegetables or a mixed vegetable salad.

Title: Beef Brisket Pot Roast
Ingredients: 4 lb. boneless fresh brisket beef, 1 large onion, coarsely chopped, salt and black pepper, all-purpose flour, water, vegetables of choice
Directions: Heat large heavy pot. Add meat. Brown on all sides without oil. Pour off any fat. Sprinkle onion around meat. Cover tightly. Cook over low heat for 1 hour. Remove from heat. Keep covered and let meat cool to lukewarm. When cool, slice across grain for serving. Return meat to pot. Sprinkle with salt and pepper. Cover and simmer 1 to 2 hours longer or until tender, turning slices once.

Title: "Kalops" Swedish Beef Stew
Ingredients: 1 1/2 lb. lean beef chuck, cut into 1-inch cubes, 3 Tbsp. flour, 2 Tbsp. butter, 1 1/2 tsp. salt, 10 whole allspice, 2 small bay leaves, hot water, 2 large carrots, sliced, 2 large onions, sliced
Directions: Dredge meat in flour; set aside. In Dutch oven, melt butter over medium heat until golden brown. Add meat and brown well. Sprinkle with any leftover flour and salt, allspice, bay leaves and 1 1/2 cups water. Stir to loosen pan drippings. Cover; simmer 1 hour and 15 minutes. Stir occasionally until meat is almost tender. Add carrots and onions and more water, if necessary, to cover and simmer until meat and vegetables are tender. Discard bay leaves. Serve with mashed potatoes and pickled beets.

Title: Italian Beef
Ingredients: 5 lb. beef roast, 1 can Parmesan cheese, 1 jar pepperoncini, oregano to taste
Directions: Cook beef until tender. Take beef out of juice and tear up into small pieces. Return to broth; add peppers, cheese and oregano. Simmer until ingredients are thoroughly blended, approximately 1/2 to 3/4 hour. Salt to taste.

Title: Sauerbraten (Sour Beef Pot Roast)
Ingredients: 4 lb. beef (chuck, round or rump), 1 onion, sliced, 3 bay leaf, 2 tsp. spices
Directions: Place meat, vinegar, spices and onion in bowl and refrigerate overnight, longer if need be. Place in iron pot and brown meat on all side. Meanwhile, strain vinegar and water and pour over brown roast and proceed to cook the same as pot roast (2 to 3 hours). Take meat out and keep warm. Add raisins and gingersnaps in 8 pot liquid. Gingersnaps will thicken the gravy. Add more crackers if you like a thicker gravy. Slice meat and serve with the gravy. Potato Rolls or noodles and red cabbage.

records.question: halal chicken recipe
records.ground_truth: A chicken recipe using halal-certified chicken, containing no pork products or alcohol in the ingredients or cooking process.
contexts:
Title: Ai'S Huli Huli Chicken
Ingredients: 12 pieces (6 birds) Cornish game hen halves, 1/2 tsp. basil, 1/2 tsp. tarragon, 1 sprig parsley, minced, 1/2 tsp. minced green onions, 1 1/2 Tbsp. celery leaves, Hawaiian salt, 1 tsp. sugar, pepper, 1 clove garlic, crushed, 1/3 c. shoyu, 2/3 c. oil
Directions: Salt chicken several hours prior to cooking. Add all ingredients (except oil) and let stand 15 minutes. Add oil. Mix well and baste chicken as it cooks over coals.

Title: Mughlai Style Chicken Haleem Recipe
Ingredients: 300 grams Boneless chicken, 1 tablespoon Rice, 3 Green Chillies, 3 tablespoon Chana dal (Bengal Gram Dal), 1 teaspoon Ginger Garlic Paste, Salt - to taste, 1 inch Cinnamon Stick (Dalchini), 1 teaspoon Cumin seeds (Jeera), 3 tablespoon Broken Wheat (Dalia/ Godumai Rava), 3 tablespoon Ghee, 1 teaspoon Ajwain (Carom seeds), 3 Cardamom (Elaichi) Pods/Seeds, 1 tablespoon Whole Black Peppercorns, 1 tablespoon Sunflower Oil, 2 Black cardamom (Badi Elaichi), 1 Bay leaf (tej patta), 2 tablespoon Coriander (Dhania) Leaves - chopped, 4 Onions - sliced, 2 tablespoon Mint Leaves (Pudina) - chopped, 2-1/2 tablespoons Red Chilli powder
Directions: To prepare Mughlai Style Chicken Haleem Recipe, dry roast all the spices mentioned under masala list Grind it into fine powder Keep aside.Soak chana dal, broken wheat, rice separately.In a saucepot add oil Add sliced onions, ginger garlic paste, green chilies sauté until onions turn brown Remove from stove and keep aside.Add 3 cups water into the same pan Add chicken pieces, salt and red chili powder Cover and bring it to rolling boil.Once chicken changes color, add the soaked dal, broken wheat and rice Cover and cook Once the chicken is cooked, remove the bay leaf.Start mashing the chicken and dal once chicken gets cooked Continue mashing and cooking until all the chicken is fully mashed along with dal Keep adding a little water as and when required.Now add the sauteed onion-ginger garlic-green chilies mix along with roasted spices Add salt to taste and continue to cook and mash.Once the haleem turns thick and all ingredients are well mashed, add ghee and mix again.Transfer the Mughlai Style Chicken Haleem Recipe to serving bowl, garnish with caramelized onions, fresh coriander leaves and some ghee on top Serve Mughlai Style Chicken Haleem Recipe topped with caramelized onions and serve as a main course meal with Mutton Keema Samosa Recipe

Title: Chicken Pilau
Ingredients: 1 (6 to 10 lb.) hen, 2 stalks celery, chopped, 2 bay leaves, 2 tsp. salt, 1 Tbsp. pepper, 2 to 3 c. raw rice, 3 small or 1 large can mushrooms, sliced and browned, coarsely ground black pepper
Directions: Cook hen with celery, bay leaves, salt, pepper and enough water to cover. When the chicken is ready to fall from the bones, remove from broth; set aside.

Title: Wet Chicken
Ingredients: 1 whole chicken, 3 c. flour, 1 c. shortening, salt and pepper
Directions: Wash and cut chicken. Lightly salt and pepper, then place in flour. Place shortening into frypan on medium heat. Brown chicken and then place into a large pot with a lid. After all chicken has been browned, pour remaining drippings over chicken and cover chicken with water. Bring to a boil and then simmer 1 hour. Remove chicken. It should have made its own gravy. Pour over rice or potatoes.

Title: Hawaiian-Style Chicken
Ingredients: 1/4 c. unsifted all-purpose flour, 1 tsp. salt, 1/8 tsp. pepper, 2 lb. frying chicken pieces, 3 Tbsp. salad oil, 1/2 c. water, 1 (10 oz.) pkg. Birds Eye Hawaiian-style vegetable with pineapple and a seasoned sauce, 1 Tbsp. catsup
Directions: Combine flour, salt and pepper; dredge chicken pieces. Heat oil in large skillet; add chicken and brown well on both sides. Turn chicken skin side up and add water. Bring to a boil; cover and simmer 30 minutes. Place chicken on platter and keep warm. Add vegetables to skillet. Bring to a full boil over medium heat, separating vegetables with fork. Stir until sauce cubes are blended. Reduce heat; cover and simmer 3 minutes. Stir in catsup and serve over chicken. Makes 3 servings.

records.question: vegan breakfast ideas
records.ground_truth: A breakfast recipe that contains no animal products — no eggs, dairy, or honey — such as oatmeal, smoothie bowls, avocado toast, or tofu scramble.
contexts:
Title: Vegetable Fritters
Ingredients: 1 pkg. soft tofu, drained and rinsed, 2 eggs, 1 c. oatmeal, 1/2 c. milk, 1/2 c. grated carrots, 1 red bell pepper, chopped, 1/2 c. grated squash (yellow or green), salt and pepper to taste
Directions: Mix ingredients; form into patties (flat). Cook in frypan with small amount of oil. Serve warm.

Title: Masala Omelette Waffles Recipe
Ingredients: Butter - for cooking, 1 Onion - small in size and chopped, 1 teaspoon Cumin powder (Jeera), 1/4 cup Broccoli - cut into small heads, Salt - to taste, 1/4 cup Milk, 1 teaspoon Red Chilli powder, 1 teaspoon Coriander Powder (Dhania), 1/4 teaspoon Turmeric powder (Haldi), 1/2 Green Bell Pepper (Capsicum) - chopped, 1 Tomato - deseeded and chopped, 4 Whole Eggs
Directions: To begin making the Masala Omelette Waffles Recipe, chop all the ingredients and keep it ready in a bowl.Break all the eggs, add milk as well and all the spice powders mentioned above including red chilli powder, cumin powder, coriander powder, turmeric powder, salt to taste and give it a nice whisk Once you mix it, add all the vegetables including onions, tomatoes, broccoli and green bell pepper.Once done, heat your waffle maker to a medium temperature Once the waffle maker is hot enough, brush it with enough butter so that the waffle does not get stuck to it.Slowly pour the whisked egg mixture into the waffle maker, just enough so that it fills up Close the waffle maker and let it cook for at least 15 minutes.Open after 15 minutes and you will see the waffles have risen and has changed to light brown color.Slowly lift the egg waffles and serve it onto your serving plate.Serve the Masala Omelette Waffles Recipe along with Mexican Salsa or a Toast by the side with a nice cup of Vegan Instant Coffee to go with for your breakfast

Title: Vegan Chickpea Omelette Recipe (Spiced Chickpea Flour Pancakes)
Ingredients: Sunflower Oil - for cooking, Salt - to taste, 1 Tomato - finely chopped, 1 inch Ginger - grated, 2-3 Green Chillies - finely chopped, 2 cloves Garlic - grated, 1 Onion - finely chopped, Coriander (Dhania) Leaves - A handful finely chopped, 1 cup Gram flour (besan), 1/2 teaspoon Ajwain (Carom seeds), 1/4 teaspoon Asafoetida (hing), 1/2 cup Coconut milk, 1/4 teaspoon Baking soda, 3/4 cup Water, 1/4 teaspoon Turmeric powder (Haldi)
Directions: To begin making the Vegan Chickpea Omelette Recipe, first place a non-stick griddle/tava on the heat Turn the heat to low so it can slowly pre-heat while you prepare the batter.To make the batter, sieve the chickpea flour/besan into a mixing bowl to remove all lumps.To it, add the ginger-garlic paste, ajwain, asafoetida, turmeric powder, baking soda, onion, tomato, green chillies, Coriander leaves and salt Mix well to combine.Next, stir in the coconut milk (or Soy or Almond milk), if using, and mix to make a smooth batter.Alternatively, add enough water to make a batter which is smooth and spreadable, but not too watery/runny.When the griddle is hot enough, pour a ladle full of the batter on it and spread evenly into a round pancake.Drizzle oil along the edges of the omelette and cook for 2-3 minutes, on medium heat till the bottom is golden brown Lift it gently with a spatula to check if it releases and if that bottom has cooked.When it looks golden, flip the omelette over and cook on the other side for 1-2 minutes.Serve hot along with Peanut Carrot Chutney

Title: Veggie Rava Idli Recipe- Healthy Breakfast Idli
Ingredients: 1-1/2 cup Sooji (Semolina/ Rava), 1 cup Curd (Dahi / Yogurt), 1/2 cup Carrot (Gajjar) - grated, 1/2 tablespoon Chana dal (Bengal Gram Dal), 1 teaspoon Enos fruit salt, Salt - to taste, 1 tablespoon Ginger - grated, 10 Curry leaves, 1 tablespoon Mustard seeds, 1 cup Water, 1/2 cup Coriander (Dhania) Leaves - finely chopped, 1 tablespoon Sunflower Oil, 1/2 cup Green peas (Matar), 3 to 4 Green Chillies - finely chopped (adjustable), 1/2 cup Sweet corn
Directions: To begin making the Veggie Rava Idli recipe, in a large bowl add the semolina/rava , yoghurt and water Whisk to combine all the ingredients.To the same bowl, add the corn, peas, carrot, green chillies, ginger, coriander and salt to the mixture Mix well to combine and leave aside Heat a tadka pan, with oil on medium heat , add the mustard seeds, chana dal, curry leaves and green chilies Saute for a minute and turn off the flame.Add the tadka to the suji/rava mixture, at this stage also add the enos fruit salt and mix well.Preheat the idli steamer with enough water, Grease plates of the idli mould Ladle the Veggie Rava Idli batter into each of the cavities and place it in the steamer Steam for 12-15 minutes After 15 minutes, check if the idlis are done, by inserting a skewer, if it comes out clean , if its not done cover and steam for a few more minutes Serve Veggie Rava Idli recipe along with Tomato Garlic Chutney and Beetroot Sambar Recipe and Banana And Mango Smoothie Recipe  for your breakfast or pack it your kids lunch box

Title: Vegetable Garden Pancakes
Ingredients: 2/3 c. finely chopped red or green bell pepper, 1 1/2 c. finely chopped or shredded cabbage, 1 1/3 c. grated carrots, 3/4 c. chopped green onions, 1/2 c. canned water chestnuts, drained and chopped, 4 eggs, 1 1/2 Tbsp. sesame seed, 1 Tbsp. soy sauce, 2/3 c. white flour, 1 Tbsp. baking powder
Directions: Mix all ingredients in a large bowl. Blend well using a fork. Pour oil (vegetable) to coat the bottom of a large, heavy skillet. Cook pancakes on medium heat 3 or 4 minutes each side, until nicely browned.

records.question: pescatarian dinner with fish
records.ground_truth: A dinner recipe featuring fish or seafood as the protein, with no meat such as chicken, beef, or pork — suitable for a pescatarian diet.
contexts:
Title: Oven Baked Fish
Ingredients: required amount of fish fillets, any brand Italian dressing
Directions: Place fillets on baking dish and brush with Italian dressing. Bake until fish flakes.

Title: Simple Broiled Fish
Ingredients: 1/2 lb. pan dressed or 1/3 lb. fish fillets per person, 1/4 c. melted butter or oil, salt for sprinkling, lemon pepper seasoning, paprika
Directions: Wash and dry fish. Place fish in single layer in foil lined shallow baking pan. Brush with butter and seasonings. Broil 4 inches from heat source for 5 to 8 minutes per side until fish is browned and flakes when tested with fork.

Title: Fish, Chicken Or Veal Parmesan
Ingredients: fish, boneless chicken or veal fillets, breading mix, favorite jar or own marinara sauce, Parmesan cheese, Provolone cheese slices
Directions: Bread meat or fish as desired. Either bake in oven or deep fry until tender. Top with favorite marinara sauce, followed by Parmesan cheese, Provolone cheese and a little more sauce. Return to oven until the cheese melts. Serve with a side order of angel hair pasta, topped with marinara sauce.

Title: Fish
Ingredients: 4 lb. fresh bass, 1 tsp. mustard, 1 can beer, 1 tsp. salt, 1 tsp. black pepper, 1 c. corn meal
Directions: Marinate fish overnight in beer and mustard. Mix salt and black pepper in corn meal, then bread fish in corn meal and fry. This recipe will serve 4 people.

Title: Fettucine Au Gratin
Ingredients: fettucine noodles (2 lb.), 1 c. fresh milk or cream or mocha mix can be used for richer flavor, 1 stick butter, fresh Parmesan cheese (to taste, approximately 3 to 4 oz.), pepper to taste
Directions: You can tell if fish is fresh if the gills are pink with fresh red blood. Fish should not smell fishy and the eyes should be clear and firm, not cloudy. The inside should be clean and the meat should be firm.

records.question: vegetarian high protein meal
records.ground_truth: A vegetarian recipe that is high in protein through ingredients such as legumes, tofu, tempeh, eggs, Greek yogurt, or cheese — containing no meat.
records.answer: Easy Low-Fat High Protein Veggie Dish
contexts:
Title: Easy Low-Fat High Protein Veggie Dish
Ingredients: 1 c. acini de pepe macaroni, 2 Tbsp. olive oil, 1 onion, diced, 1 green pepper, diced, 1 c. bulgur wheat, 1 can garbanzo beans, 1 can mushrooms, 1/2 c. chopped walnuts, 1 can spaghetti sauce, 2 c. boiling water, 1 cube vegetable bouillon, spices to taste
Directions: In large pot brown macaroni in oil. Add onion and pepper until tender. Dissolve bouillon in water and add to pot. Add remaining ingredients. Heat thoroughly for 10 minutes.

Title: Tofu Scramble Recipe
Ingredients: 1/2 teaspoon Cumin powder (Jeera), 1/2 teaspoon Turmeric powder (Haldi), 1 tablespoon Extra Virgin Olive Oil, 1 teaspoon Garam masala powder, 1 Tomato - finely chopped, 200 grams Tofu - extra firm, 2 Green Chillies - finely chopped, 1 Onion - finely chopped, 1 Parsley leaves - finely chopped, Salt and Pepper - to taste, 3 cloves Garlic - finely chopped
Directions: To begin making the Tofu Scramble Recipe, heat olive oil in a heavy bottomed pan.Add the garlic and onions and saute until the onions are lightly caramelized.Once done add the tomatoes, green chilies and saute until the tomatoes become soft.After the tomatoes are soft stir in the turmeric powder, cumin powder and garam masala powder and saute for a few seconds Finally stir in the crumbed tofu, add salt and pepper and combine well Check the salt and spices and adjust to suit your taste Cover the pan and simmer for a minute and turn off the heat.Finally stir in the chopped parsley leaves.Serve the Tofu Scramble Recipe along with a toasted bread and Muskmelon Juice to kick start your day with a high protein breakfast

Title: High Protein Broccoli & Coriander Loaf Recipe
Ingredients: 2 sprig Coriander (Dhania) Leaves - finely chopped, 2 Egg whites, 1/2 teaspoon Baking powder, 2 teaspoon Dried Thyme Leaves, 5 tablespoons Butter (unsalted) - divided, 1 teaspoon Nutmeg powder, 1/2 cup Instant Oats (Oatmeal) - ground into flour, 200 grams Broccoli - cut into medium florets, 1/4 teaspoon Baking soda, 2 tablespoons Hung Curd (Greek Yogurt)
Directions: To begin making the High Protein Broccoli & Coriander Loaf Recipe boil the broccoli or steam the broccoli in a microwave oven until it is soft Then using a food processor you can grind it into a course mixture Next add in the oats, coriander leaves, baking powder, baking soda, nutmeg powder and thyme Mix well to combine.In another bowl, combine yogurt and egg white mixture, beat till it combines well Add this to the oats mixture.Pre heat the oven at 180 degree Celsius for about 10 minutes.Pour the Broccoli & oats batter into a greased loaf tin and bake it in the oven for 20-30 minutes.Serve the High Protein Broccoli & Coriander Loaf Recipe along with a healthy Chickoo Banana Date Smoothie to kick start you Breakfast in a healthy way

Title: High Protein Spinach Basil & Cheese Omelette Recipe
Ingredients: 3-4 Garlic - sliced, Sunflower Oil - for cooking, 2 tablespoons Cheese - grated, 1 Tomato - sliced, 2 tablespoon Milk, Salt and Pepper - to taste, 2 cloves Garlic - finely chopped, 2 Whole Egg - whites only, 20 grams Spinach - sliced, 1/4 cup Sweet corn, 1 sprig Basil leaves - ground into a paste, 2 Green Chilli - finely chopped
Directions: To begin making the High Protein Spinach Basil & Cheese Omelette Recipe , first prep all the ingredients and keep it ready.Whisk the egg whites along with salt, pepper and milk, keep aside.Heat oil in a skillet, add garlic, green chilli, spinach and sweet corn and slightly saute it for 3 minutes until the spinach has softened and all the moisture has evaporated.In a small shallow pan add the beaten egg, season it with salt and pepper poke holes onto the omelette.Then add the filling onto one side of the omelette, cover and cook for 5 minutes till it is well done Once done, fold the omelette and serve warm.Serve the High Protein Spinach Basil & Cheese Omelette Recipe along with toasted bread and a glass of  breakfast

Title: High Protein Chickpea Potato Hash Brown Recipe
Ingredients: 1/2 teaspoon Cumin powder (Jeera), Salt - salt to taste, 1/2 cup Kabuli Chana (White Chickpeas), 1/2 teaspoon Black pepper powder, 1/2 cup Whole Wheat Bread crumbs, 1/2 teaspoon Butter, 1 Whole Egg, 1/2 teaspoon Lemon juice, 2 Potatoes (Aloo) - boiled
Directions: To begin making the High Protein Chickpea & Potato Hash Brown Recipe, keep the potatoes boiled and peeled and ready to use Wash and soak chickpeas overnight in a bowl of water Next morning transfer the water and the chickpeas into a pressure cooker along with some salt and close the pressure cooker Place the pressure cooker on medium-high heat and pressure cook for 25 minutes Once done, turn off the flame and allow the pressure to release naturally Open the pressure cooker, drain off the water and transfer the chickpeas into a mixing bowl Into the mixing bowl with the chickpeas, add the the potatoes and mash the mixture well, to this add salt, pepper, cumin powder, butter and lemon juice Bring the mixture together, ensuring it is well combined Divide the mixture into equal portions of lemon sized balls, and flatten between your palms shaping them into tikkis, which essentially are our Chickpea & Potato Hash Browns Set aside.Break an egg into a bowl, whisk it well and set aside Next place the bread crumbs in a plate Dip each of the hashbrowns into the egg and then roll them into the bread crumbs Heat a skillet with oil on medium-low flame, once hot place the hashbrowns dipped in egg and rolled in breadcrumbs on the skillet, cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until you get a lovely brown colour Serve High Protein Chickpea & Potato Hash Brown Recipe along with baked beans, Golden Glow Smoothie Recipe and some fresh fruits and dry fruits and nuts by the side for breakfast

records.question: gluten-free dessert
records.ground_truth: A dessert recipe that contains no gluten — no wheat flour, barley, or rye — using alternative flours such as almond flour, rice flour, or coconut flour.
contexts:
Title: Brownie Dessert
Ingredients: 1 box brownie mix, prepared according to directions, 1 small box instant chocolate pudding, prepared according to directions, 1 (8 oz.) nondairy whipped topping
Directions: Cut prepared brownies into bite-sized pieces.

Title: Delightful
Ingredients: 1 box SnackWells cinnamon snacks, fat-free butter, 1 c. light Cool Whip, 1 fat-free cream cheese, 1/2 c. sugar, 1 large instant chocolate pudding, mixed with skim milk, light Cool Whip
Directions: Add butter to cinnamon snacks to form crust. Bake for 5 minutes at 350°. Mix Cool Whip, cream cheese and sugar and spread on baked crust. Mix pudding with milk. Top with Cool Whip.

Title: Slime(A Fat Free Dessert)
Ingredients: 1 (32 oz.) container fat-free plain yogurt, 1 pkg. sugar-free instant pistachio pudding, 1 small can crushed pineapple, drained
Directions: Mix all ingredients in a large bowl. Chill and enjoy!

Title: Diabetic Fluffy Fruit Dessert
Ingredients: 1 (20 oz.) can lite chunky fruit cocktail, drained, 1 small box sugar-free Jell-O (dry), 1 (12 oz.) lite whipped topping, 1/2 c. nuts (if desired)
Directions: Mix and chill thoroughly.

Title: Cake For Diabetics
Ingredients: 1 angel food sponge cake, 1 box strawberries (no sugar), 1 box low calorie Cool Whip, 1 box strawberry jello (NutraSweet)
Directions: Put strawberries on top of cake. Mix jello and pour over cake. Refrigerate and let jello set. Serve with prepared low calorie Cool Whip.

records.question: plant-based burger
records.ground_truth: A burger recipe made without meat, using plant-based patties from ingredients such as black beans, lentils, chickpeas, mushrooms, or commercial plant-based meat alternatives.
records.answer: Vegan Burger Recipe With Beans And Tofu Patty
contexts:
Title: Vegan Burger Recipe With Beans And Tofu Patty
Ingredients: 6-7 Burger buns, 1/2 cup Carrot (Gajjar) - grated, 1 teaspoon Cumin powder (Jeera), 1/4 cup Whole Wheat Bread crumbs, 1 teaspoon Coriander Powder (Dhania), 1 Onion - chopped, 1 cup Button mushrooms - finely chopped, 1/2 tablespoon Lemon juice, 1-1/2 teaspoon Garam masala powder, 2 Potatoes (Aloo) - or raw banana, 2 teaspoon Red Chilli powder, 2 tablespoon Sunflower Oil, 3-4 tablespoon Tofu - grated, 1/2 cup Iceberg lettuce - shredded, 2-3 tablespoon Rice flour, 1/4 cup Roasted tomato pasta sauce, 1 cup Moth Dal (Matki) - soaked overnight, 1 Onion - cut into rings, 1/2 cup Mint Leaves (Pudina) - finely chopped, 1 Tomato - sliced, 1 cup Kala Chana (Brown Chickpeas) - soaked overnight or any moong beans, 1/2 cup Coriander (Dhania) Leaves - finely chopped, Salt and Pepper - to taste, 2 teaspoon Ginger Garlic Paste
Directions: To begin making the Vegan Burger Recipe With Beans And Tofu Patty firstly, pressure cook the overnight soaked mixed beans with 1/2 cup of water  and pressure cook for about 6 whistles.Turn off the flame Allow the pressure to release naturally.Open the cooker and drain the water completely.Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a Wok/pan.Add the chopped onions and ginger garlic paste.Sauté for a minute or till the onion just softens.Now add mushrooms and carrots.Stir and cook till water evaporates.To this add the coriander, cumin powder, garam masala, red chilli powder, and sauté for a few seconds.Add the cooked beans and salt Stir and sauté for another minute or till all the water evaporates.Take it off the heat Cool slightly.Pulse this bean-vegetable mixture coarsely in a food processor In a mixing bowl, add bean mixture, potatoes, tofu, herbs, lime juice, rice flour and bread crumbs.Mix and knead lightly till it everything comes together Adjust the amount of salt or masala if required.Make equal portions of the patty Drizzle some oil on a grill pan and cook them on medium flame until the patties on both sides till they turn golden brown.To ServeWarm/grill the burger buns on a pan Slice them and spread some roasted tomato sauce on one slice.Place lettuce leaf, tomato, onion and cucumber slices on it, next a patty over the salad.Drizzle more sauce and top with the other half of the bun Serve Vegan Burger Recipe With Beans And Tofu Patty immediately with Vegan Mayonnaise with more tomato sauce and Vegan Guilt Free Chocolate Espresso Mousse Recipe

Title: Veggie Chop Burger Recipe
Ingredients: 4 tablespoon Veeba Burger Mayonnaise, 1 tablespoon Water, 1 teaspoon Cumin powder (Jeera), Sunflower Oil - for cooking, Salt - to taste, 1 Beetroot - finely chopped, 4 Burger buns, 1 inch Ginger - grated, 1 teaspoon Red Chilli powder, 1/2 cup Whole Wheat Bread crumbs, 2 Onions - chopped, 2 Onions - sliced round2, Iceberg lettuce - as required, 2 Potatoes (Aloo) - peeled and chopped, Tomatoes - sliced round, 2 Carrots (Gajjar) - finely chopped, 2 tablespoons Corn flour, 1/4 cup Sweet corn - steamed, 1/4 cup Green peas (Matar) - steamed, 4 Green Chillies - chopped
Directions: To make the chopTo begin with Veggie Chop Burger Recipe, rinse all the vegetables - carrot, beetroot, potato, peas, corn and peel their skin and finely chop them Transfer all the vegetables into a pressure cooker, add salt and just ¼ cup of water and pressure cooker for 3 whistles and turn off the heat.Allow  the pressure to release naturally Once it is done, discard the water from the cooked vegetables and mash the vegetables Keep them aside.Heat a teaspoon of oil in a pan Add grated ginger, onions and green chilies and saute it till the onions turn slightly brown.Add the mashed vegetables along with salt and the cumin powder and red chilli powder into the pan Mix well and cook all the ingredients till it gets mixed with each other properly.Turn off the heat and set it aside to cool Once it is cooled down, make small lemon sized balls from the vegetable mix and shape them into cylindrical shapes and flatten it to shape them like a burger patty and keep them aside.Add corn flour to a bowl with 1 tablespoon of water and mix it well.Carefully dip the chop in the corn flour mixture and then roll it in the bread crumbs Follow it for the other chops too.Heat oil in a wide pan for Shallow frying When oil turns piping hot, reduce the flame to medium and carefully transfer the coated vegetable chops into the oil.Shallow fry for about a minute or until all the sides turn golden brown Drain on kitchen towel to soak the extra oil.To assemble the burgerCut the burger buns into 2 halves Toast the burger buns with a little butter.Place lettuce leaves, top it with onion slices, place veg chop on top, burger mayonnaise followed by tomato slices, close and serve.Serve the Veggie Chop Burger along with a glass of Banana Almond & Prunes Smoothie for a perfect weeknight dinner that you can enjoy with kids

Title: City Bakery'S Burgers(Veggie Burgers)
Ingredients: 1 C chopped onion, 1 tsp minced garlic, 2 Tbsp butter or margarine, 1/2 tsp each ground cumin and ground ginger, 1 C each coarsely chopped mushrooms and cooked thin-skinned potatoes, 1 C carrots diced in 1/4 inch pieces, 2 Tbsp chopped, fresh cilantro (coriander), 1/3 C all-purpose flour, 2 large eggs, lightly beaten, 1 C soft whole wheat bread crumbs, Salt and pepper, 1-2 tsp salad oil for frying, Toasted buns or bread, Lettuce, tomato slices, onion slices
Directions: In a 10-12 inch nonstick frying pan over medium heat, cook onion and garlic in butter, stirring often, until onion is golden; about 8 minutes. Add cumin and ginger; stir for 1 minute. Add mushrooms, potatoes, carrots and chopped cilantro. Stir often until carrots are tender to bite, about 7 minutes. Add flour and stir for 3 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool slightly. Then mix in eggs and bread crumbs. Add salt and pepper to taste.

Title: Veggie Burger
Ingredients: 4 oz. ground turkey, 1 1/2 c. fresh spinach, cooked, 1/2 c. chopped zucchini, 1 chopped green onion, black pepper to taste, Mrs. Dash to taste
Directions: Process vegetables in food processor until well chopped. Mix all with turkey. Form into burger and bake.

Title: Five Spice Bean Burger Recipe
Ingredients: 1/2 teaspoon Cloves (Laung), 1 teaspoon Garlic powder, Mixed Greens, 1 teaspoon Lemon juice, 1 teaspoon Chinese 5 Spice Powder, 2 tablespoon Coriander (Dhania) Leaves - chopped, 1 teaspoon Whole Black Peppercorns, 1 tablespoon Soy sauce, 1 Whole Egg - beaten, Salt - to taste, 2 tablespoon Classic Mayonnaise (With Egg) - or as needed, 200 grams Great Northern Beans - can, 1/2 teaspoon Black pepper powder, Cheese Slices - as needed, 2 inch Cinnamon Stick (Dalchini), 1 tablespoon Sunflower Oil, 1 teaspoon Extra Virgin Olive Oil, 1 teaspoon Sugar, 1/2 cup Whole Wheat Bread crumbs, 3 Burger buns, 1 teaspoon Fennel seeds (Saunf), 1 Star anise
Directions: To start making Five Spice Bean Burger, drain the beans to a medium bowl, reserving the liquid.Mash the beans using a potato masher Add bread crumbs, egg, pepper, garlic powder, soy sauce, sugar, lemon juice, cilantro, five spice powder with required salt.Mix all the ingredients until the mixture comes together Divide the patty mixture into equal portions and shape into patties by rolling the balls between your palms, and then slightly press them to resemble disc like shapes Heat a tablespoon of vegetable oil in a cast iron skillet over medium high heat.Place the patties and cook, turning once, until a crisp crust forms on both sides.Place the cheese slice on the top of cooked burger patty, once it starts to melt, turn off the heat and place the patty onto a plate.Meanwhile, cut the burger buns into half horizontally and toast them on a skillet.Once the burger buns are toasted, spread the mayo on each warm burger bun.Start layering the burger by adding lettuce then layer the cooked burger bean patties and cover with the top burger bun.Serve the Five Spice Bean Burgers warm for a wholesome weeknight dinner along with Baked Potato Wedge Followed by a dessert of Greek Yogurt Chocolate Mousse Recipe

records.question: pasta without tomatoes
records.ground_truth: A pasta recipe that does not include tomatoes, tomato sauce, tomato paste, or any tomato-based ingredient in any form.
contexts:
Title: Unusual Pasta
Ingredients: 2 large cans tomato sauce, 1 can tomato paste, 1 bell pepper, chopped, 1 onion, chopped, garlic powder to taste, pasta shells or noodles, cooked, white navy beans, cooked
Directions: Simmer first 5 ingredients for several hours. Cook pasta according to box directions (use desired amount). Cook beans or use leftover beans. Mix everything together and serve.

Title: Pasta Con Presto
Ingredients: 2 large cloves garlic, 2 c. tightly packed stemmed Italian parsley, 1/2 oz. fresh basil, 3 oz. grated Parmesan, preferably imported, 1 c. vegetable oil, 1/2 c. pine nuts, 1 tsp. salt
Directions: Chop 2 cloves of garlic in food processor. While processor is still running add fresh Parmesan cheese, Italian parsley, pine nuts, fresh basil, salt and vegetable oil. When mixture is soft and pasty, spoon sauce over freshly cooked hot spaghetti and mix thoroughly. Add grated Parmesan as topping.

Title: Easy Creamy Pasta
Ingredients: about 1 lb. pasta (your choice), 1 stick (8 Tbsp.) margarine, 1/4 c. heavy cream, 1 c. Parmesan cheese, grated, pepper
Directions: Cook the pasta according to the package directions. Drain well. Pour the pasta into a large bowl and quickly add the margarine, heavy cream and about half of the Parmesan cheese. Toss until well mixed. Serve immediately topped with pepper and the remaining cheese. Serves 5 to 6 people.

Title: *Pastichio 3
Ingredients: 1 lb. ziti macaroni, 1 Tbsp. salt, 6 qt. water, 1/2 c. butter, melted, 2 jumbo eggs, beaten, 1 c. Parmesan cheese
Directions: Undercook the macaroni. Rinse with hot water to wash away starch. Add melted butter. Stir to mix. Add beaten eggs and cheese.

Title: Pasta
Ingredients: 12 oz. penne or other small tubular pasta, 4 Tbsp. virgin olive oil, divided, 2 Tbsp. finely chopped garlic, 1 c. pitted ripe olives, sliced, 1/4 c. packed fresh basil leaves, chopped, 1/4 tsp. bottled red pepper flakes or up to 1 tsp., 2 c. tomato sauce, 1/2 c. cubed Mozzarella cheese, 1/2 c. grated Parmesan cheese
Directions: For pasta, drop penne into kettle of boiling water; return to boil and boil gently for 8 to 10 minutes or until tender. Drain; toss with 1 tablespoon olive oil. Return to pan and keep warm. For sauce, saute garlic slowly in 3 tablespoons olive oil in skillet until softened, but not browned. Add olives, basil, red pepper and tomato sauce. Heat. Stir in cheeses and heat, stirring until chunks begin to melt. Pour over pasta. Pass additional grated Parmesan cheese to sprinkle over if desired. Makes 4 servings.

records.question: cookies without nuts
records.ground_truth: A cookie recipe that contains no nuts of any kind — no walnuts, pecans, almonds, peanuts, cashews, or nut-derived ingredients.
contexts:
Title: Austin-Lee'S Favorite Chocolate Chip Cookies
Ingredients: 1 pkg. Pillsbury chocolate chip cookie dough
Directions: Buy cookie dough and roll out thin. Cut with a Power Ranger cookie cutter. Bake as directed on package.

Title: Angel Food Cookies
Ingredients: 1 box angel food cake mix, 1/2 c. water, 1 bag chocolate chips or coconut is also good in them
Directions: Mix together the above ingredients. Spray cookie sheet, drop by spoonful onto cookie sheet and bake for 10 minutes at 350°.

Title: Cookies Quick
Ingredients: 1 box cake mix, 1/2 c. oil, 2 eggs
Directions: Any additional ingredients you wish such as chocolate chips, butterscotch chips, peanut butter chips, etc., depending on your choice of cake mix. (Yellow cake mix is excellent for adding other flavors to.)

Title: Best Cookies
Ingredients: 1 egg, 1 c. sugar, 1/2 c. sour cream, 1 c. butter, 1/2 tsp. baking powder, flour with nutmeg

Title: Thai Coconut Curry Soup Recipe
Ingredients: 3 Onion - chopped, 2 cups Coconut milk, 1 teaspoon Sesame seeds (Til seeds), 1 teaspoon Poppy seeds, 3 cups Vegetable stock, 3 sprig Coriander (Dhania) Leaves - chopped, 1 Stalk Lemon Grass - crushed, 4 cloves Garlic - finely chopped, 3 Green Chillies - (Thai variety), 2 Kaffir lime leaves - crushed, Raisins - a few, 2 Bay leaves (tej patta), 1 teaspoon Salt - (adjust to taste), 2 cups Wheat Noodles - or rice noodles boiled, 1 teaspoon Coconut Oil, 1 teaspoon Sugar - (optional), 2 tablespoons Cashew nuts, 1 inch Ginger - finely chopped, 1/2 teaspoon Cumin seeds (Jeera)
Directions: To begin making the Thai Coconut Curry Soup Recipe, heat the coconut oil in a heavy bottomed pan Add in the bay leaves, ginger and garlic to the hot oil and fry on low heat Add in the crushed lemon grass and kaffir lime leaves at this stage and fry it for another minute.Next, add in the green chilies and chopped green onions together with the vegetable stock to the pan Cover the lid and bring all the ingredients to a boil, reducing the flame thereafter and allowing it to simmer for another 20 minutes.Now, add in the coconut milk to the pan to thicken the soup, the ground spice powder and salt and bring all of them to a boil again.Finally, pass the entire pan contents through a sieve to remove the chunkier bits and you will be left with a smooth soup.Put the curry soup back again in the pan and boil this till it reaches a good consistency.At this stage, put in the boiled whole wheat noodles or rice noodles to the soup.Serve Thai Coconut Curry Soup garnished with raisins, accompanied with toasted bread on the side Or pair Thai Coconut Curry Soup Recipe with Spicy Chilli Garlic Noodles Recipe or Thai Basil Vegetarian Fried Rice With Pineapple and Spicy Thai Red Chillies Recipe

Title: Thai Chicken Noodle Soup With Veggies Recipe
Ingredients: 1 tablespoon Lemon juice, 1/2 teaspoon Turmeric powder (Haldi), 1 teaspoon Sriracha sauce, 100 grams Chicken - shredded, Salt - to taste, 3 cups Chicken stock, 100 grams Rice Vermicelli Noodles (Thin) - boiled, 2 Stalks Celery - finely chopped with leaves, 30 grams Baby corn - sliced, 2 cloves Garlic - finely chopped, 5 sprig Coriander (Dhania) Leaves - finely chopped, 1 inch Ginger - thinly sliced, 2 Stalks Lemon Grass - thinly sliced, 1 Red Bell pepper (Capsicum) - sliced in wedges, 1 or 2 Fresh Red chillies - sliced lengthwise, 30 grams Green beans (French Beans) - cut length wise
Directions: To begin making the Thai Chicken Noodle Soup With Veggies recipe, keep the boiled noodles ready to be used Into a saucepan, add the chicken stock,  garlic, ginger, red chillies, celery stalks, lemon grass, sriracha sauce and bring to a boil on medium heay Now add gthe chicken, once the chickenhas been boiling for about 5 to 6 minutes and is partially cooked, add the vegetables - babycorn, beans, bell pepper and mix everything well.When the vegetables and chicken are tender, add the boiled noodles and give it one more brisk boil.Turn off the heat, stir in the chopped coriander leaves, lemon juice and serve Serve the Thai Chicken Noodle Soup With Veggies followed by a meal of  Chinese Fried Rice  and Healthy General Tso's Chicken Recipe for a simple weekday dinner

Title: Thai Style Khao Tom Recipe (Black Rice Clear Soup Recipe)
Ingredients: 1 Onion - sliced, 1 Onion - sliced and caramelised, 2 sprigs Spring Onion Greens - chopped, 1 Fresh Red chillies - slit diagonally, 1 tablespoon Soy sauce, 1 inch Ginger - chopped, 1 teaspoon Lemon juice, 2 cloves Garlic - chopped, Salt and Pepper - to taste, 1 Stalk Lemon Grass - slit diagonally, 4 tablespoons Black Rice, 100 grams Tofu - cubed, 2 Whole Eggs, 2 sprigs Coriander (Dhania) Leaves - chopped
Directions: To begin making the Thai Style Khao Tom Recipe, we will first make the broth, Heat 4 cups of water with black rice, lemon grass, onions, ginger and garlic.Boil it in low heat for 25 minutes This will be your main broth for your soup.In the mean while keep the egg to boil with shell, you can check our recipe on how to boil an egg.Heat a sauce pan with oil and add the onions and sauté them until it is brown and keep it aside.Check if the black rice is cooked in the broth, the rice will little crunchy so do not overcook it The black rice will take about 30 minutes to cook.Add the soy sauce, spring onions, coriander leaves and check for salt.To garnish, add the broth to a serving bowl, place the peeled boiled egg, add caramelized onions, fresh tofu and garnish it with some more coriander leaves and serve.Serve the Thai Style Khao Tom Recipe as a one dish meal for your morning breakfast as a healthy start and accompanied with Thai Grilled Pineapple or a simple Thai Som Tum salad by the side

Title: Thai Pumpkin Soup With Red Curry Paste Recipe
Ingredients: 1 Lemongrass, 2 tablespoons Extra Virgin Olive Oil - extra virgin, 2 tablespoons Thai Red Curry Paste, 1 Thai Red chilli (Birds Eye Chilli) - for garnish, 1 tablespoon Lemon juice, 1 tablespoon Coconut milk - to garnish, Salt - to taste, 3/4 Onion - chopped, 1 tablespoon Cumin seeds (Jeera), 10 Fresh Red chillies - soaked in warm water for 10 minutes, 1/2 teaspoon White pepper powder, 1 inch Ginger - or galangal, 1 cup Coconut milk - thick, 2 cups Vegetable stock, 1 cup Kaddu (Parangikai/ Pumpkin) - diced, Coriander (Dhania) Leaves - for garnishing, 1 teaspoon Black pepper powder, 4 cloves Garlic - roughly chopped
Directions: For the Red Thai Curry Paste:To prepare Thai Pumpkin Soup With Red Curry Paste Recipe, prepare the Red Thai Curry paste recipe Place the ingredients - lemongrass, red chillies, garlic, ginger, coriander seeds, cumin seeds, white pepper powder, salt to taste, lemon juicein a food processor or blender and process well to create a fragrant Thai red curry paste.Use as required or store refrigerated for further use If you find the paste too thick, add a little more coconut milk to help blend ingredients.For the Roasted Pumpkins:Add a little olive oil in a pan and add the chopped pumpkin along with salt, chilli powder and a pinch of turmeric powder Roast them till they are soft Cool and grind to a paste.Heat the remaining Olive oil in a large sauce pan and cook the curry paste for one minute or until it becomes fragrant.Add the vegetable stock along with the pumpkin puree and bring it to a boil Simmer and let it boil for a good 20  minutes on low flame.Add salt and pepper powder along with the coconut milk Stir well and cook for further 5 more minutes.Stir in the lime juice and strain the soup for a smooth texture.Pour Thai Pumpkin Soup With Red Curry Paste Recipe into serving bowls Swirl in some coconut milk and garnish with pepper powder, red chillies and fresh coriander leaves.Serve with Vegetarian Pad Thai Recipe for wholesome and comforting meal

Title: Tom Kha Kaichicken Coconut Soup
Ingredients: 1/2 lb. Chicken Breast meat, Herbs and Spices, 2 Stalks Fresh Lemon Grass, 2 Kaffir Leaves, 2 Whole Shallots, 2 Dried Red Chili Peppers, 2 to 4 Slices 2 Tbsp. Galangal Root (Laos Root), 1/4 c. Scallions 1 inch long, 2 Tbsp. Fish Sauce, 2 Tbsp. Lime Juice, 1 Tbsp. Chili Paste, 2 c. Chicken Broth, 2 c. Coconut Milk, 1/4 c. Cilantro
Directions: Cut up the chicken meat either diced or in strips, chop lemon grass and kaffir leaves in food processor or hand chop finely. Cut the shallots to 1/4 inch strips, cut scallions to 1 inch pieces, chop cilantro with stems, no roots. Peel and slice the galangal root in thin strips 1/2 inch long. Heat pan on medium, add the kaffir, lemon grass, shallots, whole dried chilis, and galangal, stir until light brown. Add the chicken broth and increase the heat to high and bring to a boil. Add chicken, coconut and milk, fish sauce and 1/2 teaspoon chili paste. Add the chili paste in increments and taste before adding the second half. Heat almost to boiling, remove from the heat, add lime juice, cilantro and scallions. Serves 4.
